When you play a Permanent with Hand Cost.EN: When you play a Permanent with Hand Cost {3} or more — You may exhaust me ({T}) to create a <BRASSBUG> Robot token in target Expedition.
When you play a Permanent with Hand Cost.FR: Lorsque vous jouez un Permanent avec un Coût de Main {3} ou plus — Vous pouvez m'épuiser ({T}) pour créer un jeton Robot <BRASSBUG> dans l'Expédition ciblée.
When you play a Permanent with Hand Cost.DE: Wenn du eine bleibende Karte mit Handkosten {3} oder mehr spielst — Du darfst mich erschöpfen ({T}), um eine <BRASSBUG>-Robotermarke in einer Expedition deiner Wahl zu erschaffen.
When you play a Permanent with Hand Cost.ES: Cuando juegues un permanente con coste desde la mano de {3} o más — Puedes agotarme ({T}) para crear una ficha de robot <BRASSBUG> en una expedición objetivo.
When you play a Permanent with Hand Cost.IT: Quando giochi un permanente con costo dalla mano pari o superiore a {3} — Puoi consumarmi ({T}) per creare una pedina Robot <BRASSBUG> in una spedizione bersaglio.

I don't know if there's a better reward.EN: I don't know if there's a better reward than seeing something you've built come to life.
I don't know if there's a better reward.FR: Existe-t-il meilleure récompense que de voir ses créations prendre vie ?
I don't know if there's a better reward.DE: Ich kenne keine größere Belohnung, als mitzuerleben, wie etwas zum Leben erwacht, das man selbst erschaffen hat.
I don't know if there's a better reward.ES: ¿Qué mejor recompensa hay que ver cómo algo que has construido cobra vida?
I don't know if there's a better reward.IT: Non credo ci sia miglior ricompensa che vedere qualcosa che hai creato prendere vita.

When a card leaves your Reserve during t.EN: When a card leaves your Reserve during the Afternoon, if I have less than five Scrap counters— I gain a Scrap counter.  If I have five or more Scrap counters, I gain "{T} : Draw a card, then put a card from your hand in Reserve."
When a card leaves your Reserve during t.FR: Lorsqu'une carte quitte votre Réserve pendant l'Après-midi, si j'ai moins de cinq compteurs Ferraille — Je gagne un compteur Ferraille.  Si j'ai au moins cinq compteurs Ferraille, je gagne « {T} : Piochez une carte, puis mettez une carte de votre main en Réserve. »
When a card leaves your Reserve during t.DE: Wenn eine Karte am Nachmittag deine Reserve verlässt und falls ich weniger als fünf Schrottzähler habe — Ich erhalte einen Schrottzähler.  Falls ich fünf oder mehr Schrottzähler habe, erhalte ich "{T} : Ziehe eine Karte und lege dann eine Karte aus deiner Hand in die Reserve."
When a card leaves your Reserve during t.ES: Cuando una carta abandone tu reserva durante la tarde, si tengo menos de cinco contadores de chatarra — Gano un contador de chatarra.  Si tengo cinco contadores de chatarra o más, gano "{T}: Roba una carta y luego coloca una carta de tu mano en la reserva".
When a card leaves your Reserve during t.IT: Quando una carta lascia la tua Riserva durante il pomeriggio, se ho meno di cinque segnalini Rottame — Ottengo un segnalino Rottame.  Se ho cinque o più segnalini Rottame, ottengo "{T}: pesca una carta, poi metti una carta dalla tua mano nella Riserva."

An energy system is a piece of subtle ma.EN: An energy system is a piece of subtle machinery to be optimized for better output.
An energy system is a piece of subtle ma.FR: Tout système énergétique est une machinerie subtile, à optimiser pour en tirer le meilleur rendement.
An energy system is a piece of subtle ma.DE: Ein Energiesystem ist ein Teil einer raffinierten Maschinerie, die für Höchstleistungen optimiert werden muss.
An energy system is a piece of subtle ma.ES: Todo sistema de energía es una pieza de delicada maquinaria por optimizar.
An energy system is a piece of subtle ma.IT: Un sistema energetico è un raffinato meccanismo da ottimizzare per migliorarne il risultato.

At Noon — You may pay {1} and put a card.EN: At Noon — You may pay {1} and put a card from your hand in Reserve to create a <BRASSBUG> Robot token in target Expedition.
At Noon — You may pay {1} and put a card.FR: À Midi — Vous pouvez payer {1} et mettre une carte de votre main en Réserve pour créer un jeton Robot <BRASSBUG> dans l'Expédition ciblée.
At Noon — You may pay {1} and put a card.DE: Zum Mittag — Du darfst {1} bezahlen und eine Karte aus deiner Hand in die Reserve legen, um eine <BRASSBUG>-Robotermarke in einer Expedition deiner Wahl zu erschaffen.
At Noon — You may pay {1} and put a card.ES: Al mediodía — Puedes pagar {1} y colocar una carta de tu mano en la reserva para crear una ficha de robot <BRASSBUG> en una expedición objetivo.
At Noon — You may pay {1} and put a card.IT: A mezzogiorno — Puoi pagare {1} e mettere una carta dalla tua mano nella Riserva per creare una pedina Robot <BRASSBUG> in una spedizione bersaglio.

There are still endless possibilities, e.EN: There are still endless possibilities, even in a world of finite resources. In the end, it all comes down to how you choose to spend 'em.
There are still endless possibilities, e.FR: Les possibilités sont toujours infinies, même dans un monde aux ressources limitées. Tout dépend de la façon dont on choisit de les dépenser.
There are still endless possibilities, e.DE: Selbst in einer Welt mit endlichen Ressourcen gibt es unendlich viele Möglichkeiten. Letzten Endes kommt es nur darauf an, wie man sie verwenden will.
There are still endless possibilities, e.ES: Incluso en un mundo con recursos limitados, las posibilidades siguen siendo infinitas. Lo que importa al final es cómo decides usarlos.
There are still endless possibilities, e.IT: Ci sono ancora infinite possibilità, persino in un mondo di risorse finite. In fin dei conti, tutto dipende da come decidi di usarle.

{H} Put a card from your hand in Reserve.EN: {H} Put a card from your hand in Reserve.
{H} Put a card from your hand in Reserve.FR: {H} Mettez une carte de votre main en Réserve.
{H} Put a card from your hand in Reserve.DE: {H} Lege eine Karte aus deiner Hand in die Reserve.
{H} Put a card from your hand in Reserve.ES: {H} Coloca una carta de tu mano en la reserva.
{H} Put a card from your hand in Reserve.IT: {H} Metti una carta dalla tua mano nella Riserva.

In true Axiom fashion, Kelon Elementals.EN: In true Axiom fashion, Kelon Elementals like to put everything to the taste.
In true Axiom fashion, Kelon Elementals.FR: Tout comme les ingénieurs Axiom, les Elémentaires de Kelon ont le goût de la découverte.
In true Axiom fashion, Kelon Elementals.DE: In typischer Axiom-Manier probieren Kelon-Elementare gerne alles.
In true Axiom fashion, Kelon Elementals.ES: Como es costumbre en Axiom, a los elementales de kelón les encanta probarlo todo, a veces literalmente.
In true Axiom fashion, Kelon Elementals.IT: In perfetto stile Axiom, agli elementali di Kelon piace sperimentare con qualsiasi cosa.

{H} #You may# put a card from your hand.EN: {H} #You may# put a card from your hand in Reserve.
{H} #You may# put a card from your hand.FR: {H} #Vous pouvez mettre# une carte de votre main en Réserve.
{H} #You may# put a card from your hand.DE: {H} Du #darfst# eine Karte aus deiner Hand in die Reserve legen.
{H} #You may# put a card from your hand.ES: {H} #Puedes# colocar una carta de tu mano en la reserva.
{H} #You may# put a card from your hand.IT: {H} #Puoi# mettere una carta dalla tua mano nella Riserva.

{R} The next Permanent you play this Aft.EN: {R} The next Permanent you play this Afternoon costs {1} less.
{R} The next Permanent you play this Aft.FR: {R} Le prochain Permanent que vous jouez cet Après-midi coûte {1} de moins.
{R} The next Permanent you play this Aft.DE: {R} Die nächste bleibende Karte, die du heute Nachmittag spielst, kostet {1} weniger.
{R} The next Permanent you play this Aft.ES: {R} El siguiente permanente que juegues esta tarde cuesta {1} menos.
{R} The next Permanent you play this Aft.IT: {R} Il prossimo permanente che giochi questo pomeriggio costa {1} in meno.

Behind every Axiom masterwork, there are.EN: Behind every Axiom masterwork, there are Foundry Engineers.
Behind every Axiom masterwork, there are.FR: Derrière chaque chef-d'œuvre Axiom, il y a des ingénieurs de la Fonderie.
Behind every Axiom masterwork, there are.ES: Detrás de cada obra maestra de Axiom, hay un ingeniero de la Fundición.
Behind every Axiom masterwork, there are.IT: Dietro ogni capolavoro degli Axiom ci sono gli ingegneri della Fonderia.

{R} The next Permanent you play this Aft.EN: {R} The next Permanent you play this Afternoon costs #{2} less#.
{R} The next Permanent you play this Aft.FR: {R} Le prochain Permanent que vous jouez cet Après-midi coûte #{2} de moins#.
{R} The next Permanent you play this Aft.DE: {R} Die nächste bleibende Karte, die du heute Nachmittag spielst, kostet #{2} weniger#.
{R} The next Permanent you play this Aft.ES: {R} El siguiente permanente que juegues esta tarde cuesta #{2} menos#.
{R} The next Permanent you play this Aft.IT: {R} Il prossimo permanente che giochi questo pomeriggio costa #{2} in meno#.

{J} Robots you control gain 1 boost$<BB>.FR: {J} Les Robots que vous contrôlez gagnent 1 boost$<BB>.
{J} Robots you control gain 1 boost$<BB>.DE: {J} Roboter, die du kontrollierst, erhalten 1 Verstärkung$<BB>.
{J} Robots you control gain 1 boost$<BB>.ES: {J} Los robots que controlas ganan 1 potenciador$<BB>.
{J} Robots you control gain 1 boost$<BB>.IT: {J} I Robot che controlli ottengono 1 rinforzo$<BB>.

With every blow of his hammer, Ogun forg.EN: With every blow of his hammer, Ogun forges the Axiom's destiny.
With every blow of his hammer, Ogun forg.FR: À chaque coup de marteau, Ogun forge le destin des Axiom.
With every blow of his hammer, Ogun forg.DE: Mit jedem Schlag seines Hammers schmiedet Ogun das Schicksal der Axiom.
With every blow of his hammer, Ogun forg.ES: Con cada golpe de su martillo, Ogun forja el destino de Axiom.
With every blow of his hammer, Ogun forg.IT: Con ogni colpo di martello, Ogun forgia il destino degli Axiom.

{J} #You may pay {2} to create a <BRASSB.EN: {J} #You may pay {2} to create a <BRASSBUG> Robot token in target Expedition.# Then, Robots you control gain 1 boost.
{J} #You may pay {2} to create a <BRASSB.FR: {J} #Vous pouvez payer {2} pour créer un jeton Robot <BRASSBUG> dans l'Expédition ciblée.# Puis, les Robots que vous contrôlez gagnent 1 boost.
{J} #You may pay {2} to create a <BRASSB.DE: {J} #Du darfst {2} bezahlen, um eine <BRASSBUG>-Robotermarke in einer Expedition deiner Wahl zu erschaffen.# Roboter, die du kontrollierst, erhalten dadurch 1 Verstärkung.
{J} #You may pay {2} to create a <BRASSB.ES: {J} #Puedes pagar {2} para crear una ficha de robot <BRASSBUG> en una expedición objetivo.# Luego, los robots que controlas ganan 1 potenciador.
{J} #You may pay {2} to create a <BRASSB.IT: {J} #Puoi pagare {2} per creare una pedina Robot <BRASSBUG> in una spedizione bersaglio.# Poi, i Robot che controlli ottengono 1 rinforzo.

{J} #Plants# you control gain 1 boost..FR: {J} #Les Plantes# que vous contrôlez gagnent 1 boost.

{D} : The next Permanent you play this t.EN: {D} : The next Permanent you play this turn costs {1} less. (Discard me from Reserve to do this.)
{D} : The next Permanent you play this t.FR: {D} : Le prochain Permanent que vous jouez ce tour coûte {1} de moins. (Défaussez-moi de la Réserve pour ça.)
{D} : The next Permanent you play this t.DE: {D} : Die nächste bleibende Karte, die du in dieser Runde spielst, kostet {1} weniger. (Lege mich aus der Reserve ab, um diese Aktion auszuführen.)
{D} : The next Permanent you play this t.ES: {D}: El siguiente permanente que juegues este turno cuesta {1} menos. (Descártame de la reserva para hacer esto.)
{D} : The next Permanent you play this t.IT: {D}: il prossimo permanente che giochi in questo turno costa {1} in meno. (Scartami dalla Riserva per giocare questa azione.)

You can't choose when and where a quick.EN: You can't choose when and where a quick fix will be needed.
You can't choose when and where a quick.FR: On ne choisit jamais où et quand un petit correctif est nécessaire.
You can't choose when and where a quick.DE: Man kann sich nicht aussuchen, wann und wo eine schnelle Lösung vonnöten sein wird.
You can't choose when and where a quick.ES: Uno nunca sabe cuándo va a necesitar hacer un apaño.
You can't choose when and where a quick.IT: Non si sa mai quando e dove sarà necessaria una riparazione rapida.

The Axiom's limited resources pushed the.EN: The Axiom's limited resources pushed them to reuse whatever they could.
The Axiom's limited resources pushed the.FR: Les ressources limitées ont toujours poussé les Axiom à recycler ce qui pouvait l'être.
The Axiom's limited resources pushed the.DE: Die begrenzten Ressourcen der Axiom zwangen sie dazu, so viel wie möglich wiederzuverwenden.
The Axiom's limited resources pushed the.ES: Los recursos limitados de Axiom los motivan a reutilizar todo lo que puedan.
The Axiom's limited resources pushed the.IT: Vista la scarsità di risorse, gli Axiom hanno imparato a riutilizzare tutto ciò che potevano.

Ting! Ting-a-ling! There's something mag.EN: Ting! Ting-a-ling! There's something magical in mischievous tinkering...
Ting! Ting-a-ling! There's something mag.FR: Ding ding ! Quand quelque chose cloche, autant passer par la case rafistolage.
Ting! Ting-a-ling! There's something mag.DE: Ting! Ting-ting-ting! Die frohgemute Flickerei hat etwas Magisches an sich …
Ting! Ting-a-ling! There's something mag.ES: ¡Ding, ding, ding! Cacharrear con picardía es mágico.
Ting! Ting-a-ling! There's something mag.IT: Din! Din! Din! C'è qualcosa di magico nel combinare qualche marachella...

\"This material does not seem to be affe.EN: "This material does not seem to be affected by gravity. By harnessing the properties of this Aerolith, we could create flying ships and cities, and fly close to the clouds..."
\"This material does not seem to be affe.FR: "L'Aérolithe ne semble pas affectée par la gravité. En domestiquant ses propriétés, nous pourrions créer des vaisseaux et des villes volantes, tutoyer les nuages..."
\"This material does not seem to be affe.DE: "Dieses Material scheint nicht von der Schwerkraft beeinflusst zu werden. Wenn wir uns die Eigenschaften des Aerolit zunutze machen, könnten wir schwebende Schiffe und Städte bauen und bis in die Wolken fliegen …"
\"This material does not seem to be affe.ES: «Este material no parece verse afectado por la gravedad. Si explotamos las propiedades de este aerolito, podríamos crear barcos y ciudades flotantes y volar junto a las nubes...».
\"This material does not seem to be affe.IT: "Sembra che la forza di gravità non abbia effetto su questo materiale. Sfruttando le proprietà di questo aerolite, potremmo creare navi e città volanti e volteggiare verso le nuvole..."

#{D} : Activate the {j} triggers of targ.EN: #{D} : Activate the {j} triggers of target Permanent you control.# (Discard me from Reserve to do this.)
#{D} : Activate the {j} triggers of targ.FR: #{D} : Activez les déclencheurs {j} du Permanent ciblé que vous contrôlez.# (Défaussez-moi de la Réserve pour ça.)
#{D} : Activate the {j} triggers of targ.DE: #{D} : Aktiviere die {j} Auslöser einer bleibenden Karte deiner Wahl, die du kontrollierst.# (Lege mich aus der Reserve ab, um diese Aktion auszuführen.)
#{D} : Activate the {j} triggers of targ.ES: #{D}: Activa los efectos disparados {j} de un permanente objetivo que controles.# (Descártame de la reserva para hacer esto.)
#{D} : Activate the {j} triggers of targ.IT: #{D}: attiva gli inneschi {j} di un permanente bersaglio che controlli.# (Scartami dalla Riserva per giocare questa azione.)

\"The most effective way to do it, is to.EN: "The most effective way to do it, is to do it."
\"The most effective way to do it, is to.FR: "La façon la plus efficace de le faire, c'est de le faire."
\"The most effective way to do it, is to.DE: "Am effektivsten geht man etwas an, indem man es einfach angeht."
\"The most effective way to do it, is to.ES: «La forma más eficaz de hacer algo es hacerlo».
\"The most effective way to do it, is to.IT: "Il modo più efficace di fare qualcosa è.… farlo."

{J} If you control two or more Landmarks.EN: {J} If you control two or more Landmarks, I gain 1 boost$<BB>. (Cards in Reserve are not controlled.)
{J} If you control two or more Landmarks.FR: {J} Si vous contrôlez au moins deux Repères, je gagne 1 boost$<BB>. (Les cartes en Réserve ne sont pas contrôlées.)
{J} If you control two or more Landmarks.DE: {J} Falls du mindestens zwei Wahrzeichen kontrollierst, erhalte ich 1 Verstärkung$<BB>. (Karten in der Reserve werden nicht kontrolliert.)
{J} If you control two or more Landmarks.ES: {J} Si controlas dos hitos o más, gano 1 potenciador$<BB>. (Las cartas de la reserva no las controla nadie.)
{J} If you control two or more Landmarks.IT: {J} Se controlli due o più fulcri, ottengo 1 rinforzo$<BB>. (Le carte nella Riserva non sono controllate.)

Together they can build more than just a.EN: Together they can build more than just a stone house.
Together they can build more than just a.FR: Ensemble, ils peuvent construire bien plus qu'une simple maison de pierre.
Together they can build more than just a.DE: Gemeinsam können sie mehr bauen als nur ein Haus aus Stein.
Together they can build more than just a.ES: Juntos pueden construir mucho más que una casa de ladrillo.
Together they can build more than just a.IT: Insieme sono in grado di costruire molto più di una semplice casa di pietra.

{J} If you control two or more Landmarks.EN: {J} If you control two or more Landmarks, I gain #2 boosts$<BB>#. (Cards in Reserve are not controlled.)
{J} If you control two or more Landmarks.FR: {J} Si vous contrôlez au moins deux Repères, je gagne #2 boosts$<BB>#. (Les cartes en Réserve ne sont pas contrôlées.)
{J} If you control two or more Landmarks.DE: {J} Falls du mindestens zwei Wahrzeichen kontrollierst, erhalte ich #2 Verstärkungen$<BB>#. (Karten in der Reserve werden nicht kontrolliert.)
{J} If you control two or more Landmarks.ES: {J} Si controlas dos hitos o más, gano #2 potenciadores$<BB>#. (Las cartas de la reserva no las controla nadie.)
{J} If you control two or more Landmarks.IT: {J} Se controlli due o più fulcri, ottengo #2 rinforzi$<BB>#. (Le carte nella Riserva non sono controllate.)

{J} If you control #one or more# Landmar.EN: {J} If you control #one or more# Landmarks, I gain 1 boost.
{J} If you control #one or more# Landmar.FR: {J} Si vous contrôlez #au moins un# Repère, je gagne 1 boost.
{J} If you control #one or more# Landmar.DE: {J} Falls du #mindestens ein# Wahrzeichen kontrollierst, erhalte ich 1 Verstärkung.
{J} If you control #one or more# Landmar.ES: {J} Si controlas #un# hito o más, gano 1 potenciador.
{J} If you control #one or more# Landmar.IT: {J} Se controlli #uno o più# fulcri, ottengo 1 rinforzo.

{R} You may put a card from your hand in.EN: {R} You may put a card from your hand in Reserve. If it's a Permanent, draw a card.
{R} You may put a card from your hand in.FR: {R} Vous pouvez mettre une carte de votre main en Réserve. Si c'est un Permanent, piochez une carte.
{R} You may put a card from your hand in.DE: {R} Du darfst eine Karte aus deiner Hand in deine Reserve legen. Falls es eine bleibende Karte ist, ziehe eine Karte.
{R} You may put a card from your hand in.ES: {R} Puedes colocar una carta de tu mano en la reserva. Si es un permanente, roba una carta.
{R} You may put a card from your hand in.IT: {R} Puoi mettere una carta dalla tua mano nella Riserva. Se è un permanente, pesca una carta.

\"Imagination is the discovering faculty.EN: "Imagination is the discovering faculty. It is that which penetrates the unseen worlds around us."
\"Imagination is the discovering faculty.FR: "L'imagination est la faculté de découvrir. C'est elle qui révèle les mondes invisibles qui nous entourent."
\"Imagination is the discovering faculty.DE: "Die Vorstellung ist die enthüllende geistige Kraft. Sie ist in der Lage, die unsichtbaren Welten um uns herum zu durchdringen."
\"Imagination is the discovering faculty.ES: «La imaginación es la facultad de descubrir. Es aquello que penetra en los mundos invisibles que nos rodean».
\"Imagination is the discovering faculty.IT: "L'immaginazione è la capacità di scoperta. È ciò che penetra nei mondi invisibili che ci circondano."

{R} You may put a card from your hand in.EN: {R} You may put a card from your hand in Reserve #to draw a card#.
{R} You may put a card from your hand in.FR: {R} Vous pouvez mettre une carte de votre main en Réserve #pour piocher une carte#.
{R} You may put a card from your hand in.DE: {R} Du darfst eine Karte aus deiner Hand in deine Reserve legen, #um eine Karte zu ziehen#.
{R} You may put a card from your hand in.ES: {R} Puedes colocar una carta de tu mano en la reserva #para robar una carta#.
{R} You may put a card from your hand in.IT: {R} Puoi mettere una carta dalla tua mano nella Riserva #per pescare una carta#.

{R} You may put a card from your hand in.EN: {R} You may put a card from your hand in Reserve. If it's a #Spell#, draw a card.
{R} You may put a card from your hand in.FR: {R} Vous pouvez mettre une carte de votre main en Réserve. Si c'est un #Sort#, piochez une carte.
{R} You may put a card from your hand in.DE: {R} Du darfst eine Karte aus deiner Hand in deine Reserve legen. Falls es ein #Zauber# ist, ziehe eine Karte.
{R} You may put a card from your hand in.ES: {R} Puedes colocar una carta de tu mano en la reserva. Si es un #hechizo#, roba una carta.
{R} You may put a card from your hand in.IT: {R} Puoi mettere una carta dalla tua mano nella Riserva. Se è una #magia#, pesca una carta.

When I go to Reserve from your hand — Yo.EN: When I go to Reserve from your hand — You may play me for free and I gain $<ASLEEP>.
When I go to Reserve from your hand — Yo.FR: Lorsque je vais en Réserve depuis votre main — Vous pouvez me jouer gratuitement et je gagne $<ASLEEP>.
When I go to Reserve from your hand — Yo.DE: Wenn ich aus deiner Hand in die Reserve gehe — Du darfst mich gratis spielen und ich erhalte $<ASLEEP>.
When I go to Reserve from your hand — Yo.ES: Cuando voy a la reserva desde tu mano — Puedes jugarme sin coste y gano $<ASLEEP>.
When I go to Reserve from your hand — Yo.IT: Quando vado nella Riserva dalla tua mano — Puoi giocarmi senza pagare il mio costo e ottengo $<ASLEEP>.

Because of her artificial nature, she se.EN: Because of her artificial nature, she served as a model for the Faction's first Automata prototypes.
Because of her artificial nature, she se.FR: Par sa nature artificielle, elle a servi de modèle pour les premiers prototypes d'automates de la Faction.
Because of her artificial nature, she se.DE: Aufgrund ihrer künstlichen Natur diente sie als Modell für die ersten Automata-Prototypen der Fraktion.
Because of her artificial nature, she se.ES: Debido a su naturaleza artificial, sirvió de modelo para los primeros prototipos de autómata de Axiom.
Because of her artificial nature, she se.IT: Per via della sua natura artificiale, funse da modella per i primi prototipi di automi della fazione.

Pushing back the Tumult sometimes preven.EN: Pushing back the Tumult sometimes prevents other Alterers from materializing their Eidolons. Regrettable, but necessary.
Pushing back the Tumult sometimes preven.FR: Repousser le Tumulte empêche parfois d'autres Altérateurs de matérialiser leurs Eidolons. Un mal nécessaire.
Pushing back the Tumult sometimes preven.DE: Das Eindämmen des Tumults hindert andere Alterer gelegentlich daran, ihre Eidolons zu materialisieren. Bedauerlich, aber notwendig.
Pushing back the Tumult sometimes preven.ES: A veces, mantener a raya el Tumulto impide que otros Alteradores materialicen sus eidolones. Una pena, pero es necesario.
Pushing back the Tumult sometimes preven.IT: A volte frenare il Tumulto impedisce agli altri alterer di far materializzare i loro eidolon. Spiacevole, ma necessario.

{R} Create a <BRASSBUG> Robot token in t.EN: {R} Create a <BRASSBUG> Robot token in target Expedition.
{R} Create a <BRASSBUG> Robot token in t.FR: {R} Créez un jeton Robot <BRASSBUG> dans l'Expédition ciblée.
{R} Create a <BRASSBUG> Robot token in t.DE: {R} Erschaffe eine <BRASSBUG>-Robotermarke in einer Expedition deiner Wahl.

Few people visit the depths of the Found.EN: Few people visit the depths of the Foundry, and even fewer can explain how the Brassbugs came to be.
Few people visit the depths of the Found.FR: Rares sont ceux qui visitent les profondeurs de la Fonderie, et encore plus rares ceux qui savent expliquer d'où viennent les Scarabots.
Few people visit the depths of the Found.DE: Nur wenige Menschen besuchen die Tiefen der Gießerei, und noch weniger können erklären, wie die Blechkäfer entstanden sind.
Few people visit the depths of the Found.ES: Pocos visitan las profundidades de la Fundición, y aún menos pueden explicar cómo fueron creados los bicholatas.
Few people visit the depths of the Found.IT: Poche persone si addentrano nelle profondità della Fonderia e ancora meno riescono a spiegare l'origine delle ottonblatte.

Nothing is created, nothing is lost, eve.EN: Nothing is created, nothing is lost, everything is transformed.
Nothing is created, nothing is lost, eve.FR: Rien ne se perd, rien ne se crée, tout se transforme.
Nothing is created, nothing is lost, eve.DE: Nichts wird geschaffen, nichts geht verloren, alles verwandelt sich.
Nothing is created, nothing is lost, eve.ES: Nada se pierde, nada se crea, todo se transforma.
Nothing is created, nothing is lost, eve.IT: Nulla si crea, nulla si distrugge, tutto si trasforma.

This little battery is Axiom's trump car.EN: This little battery is Axiom's trump card. The Kelon produces phenomenal energy for which engineers find new applications every day.
This little battery is Axiom's trump car.FR: Cette petite pile est la carte maîtresse de l'Axiom. Le Kelon produit une énergie phénoménale, pour laquelle les ingénieurs trouvent chaque jour de nouvelles applications.
This little battery is Axiom's trump car.DE: Diese kleine Batterie ist der Trumpf der Axiom. Das Kelon erzeugt eine phänomenale Energie, für die Ingenieure täglich neue Anwendungen finden.
This little battery is Axiom's trump car.ES: Esta pequeña batería es el as en la manga de Axiom. El kelón es una fuente de energía asombrosa y los ingenieros encuentran nuevos usos para ella cada día.
This little battery is Axiom's trump car.IT: Questa piccola batteria è l'asso nella manica degli Axiom. Il Kelon produce un'energia fenomenale a cui gli ingegneri dedicano nuovi impieghi ogni giorno.

\"Suspira's mines will soon run dry. You.EN: "Suspira's mines will soon run dry. Your precious Kelon will run dry."
\"Suspira's mines will soon run dry. You.FR: "Les mines de Suspira seront bientôt exsangues. Votre précieux Kelon va se tarir."
\"Suspira's mines will soon run dry. You.DE: "Die Minen von Suspira werden bald erschöpft sein. Dann wird euer kostbares Kelon versiegen."
\"Suspira's mines will soon run dry. You.ES: «Las minas de Suspira pronto se agotarán. Vuestro precioso kelón dejará de manar».
\"Suspira's mines will soon run dry. You.IT: "Le miniere di Suspira si esauriranno presto. Il vostro prezioso Kelon si esaurirà."

\"In a jam? Sorry, mate. Maybe a side-ef.EN: "In a jam? Sorry, mate. Maybe a side-effect of our scrambling..."
\"In a jam? Sorry, mate. Maybe a side-ef.FR: "Désolé, mon pote. C'est pas qu'on cherche la brouille. Ça doit être un effet secondaire de notre blocage..."
\"In a jam? Sorry, mate. Maybe a side-ef.DE: "Eine Störung? Tut mir leid, Kumpel. Vielleicht ein Nebeneffekt unserer Aktivitäten …"
\"In a jam? Sorry, mate. Maybe a side-ef.ES: «Siento que nuestras inter-ferencias te hayan inter-rumpido, colega».
\"In a jam? Sorry, mate. Maybe a side-ef.IT: "Sei nei guai? Mi dispiace, collega. Forse è un effetto collaterale dell'aver disturbato le frequenze..."

Embedded in the cliff wall, it overlooks.EN: Embedded in the cliff wall, it overlooks the city and reminds everyone who looks up at it that nothing is unreachable if you put your mind to it.
Embedded in the cliff wall, it overlooks.FR: Enchâssée dans la falaise, elle surplombe la ville, rappelant à tous ceux qui lèvent les yeux que rien n'est inaccessible si l'on s'en donne la peine.
Embedded in the cliff wall, it overlooks.DE: Eingebettet in die Felswand überblickt sie die Stadt und erinnert alle, die zu ihr hinaufschauen: Wo ein Wille ist, ist auch ein Weg.
Embedded in the cliff wall, it overlooks.ES: Incrustada en la pared de un acantilado, se alza sobre la ciudad y recuerda a todos los que la admiran que nada es inalcanzable si pones todo tu empeño.
Embedded in the cliff wall, it overlooks.IT: Incastonata in una parete rocciosa, si affaccia sulla città e ricorda a chiunque la osservi che impegnandosi nulla è inarrivabile.

What could possibly go wrong with an ado.EN: What could possibly go wrong with an adorable little self-replicating autonomous robot?
What could possibly go wrong with an ado.FR: Un petit robot autonome, mignon, autoréplicateur... Qu'est-ce qui pourrait mal se passer ?
What could possibly go wrong with an ado.DE: Was könnte bei einem so niedlichen kleinen, selbst reproduzierenden, autonomen Roboter schon schiefgehen?
What could possibly go wrong with an ado.ES: No es más que un adorable robot autónomo capaz de autorreplicarse. ¿Qué podría salir mal?
What could possibly go wrong with an ado.IT: Cosa mai potrebbe andare storto con un piccolo e adorabile robot autonomo autoreplicante?

At Noon, if you are the first player — C.FR: À Midi, si vous êtes le premier joueur — Créez un jeton Compagnon <BOODA> dans votre Expédition Compagnon.
At Noon, if you are the first player — C.DE: Zum Mittag, falls du der erste Spieler bist — Erschaffe eine <BOODA>-Gefährtenmarke in deiner Gefährten-Expedition.
At Noon, if you are the first player — C.ES: Al mediodía, si eres el primer jugador — Crea una ficha de compañero <BOODA> en tu expedición del compañero.
At Noon, if you are the first player — C.IT: A mezzogiorno, se sei il primo giocatore — Crea una pedina Compagno <BOODA> nella spedizione del tuo compagno.

Faster, ever faster! Our fire rages high.EN: Faster, ever faster! Our fire rages highest when the race is afoot!
Faster, ever faster! Our fire rages high.FR: Plus vite, encore plus vite ! C'est dans la course que notre feu s'exprime !
Faster, ever faster! Our fire rages high.DE: Schneller, immer schneller! Unser Feuer wütet am stärksten, wenn das Rennen in vollem Gange ist!
Faster, ever faster! Our fire rages high.ES: ¡Más rápido, más! ¡Nuestra llama arde más fuerte cuando corremos!
Faster, ever faster! Our fire rages high.IT: Più veloce, più veloce! Il nostro fuoco infuria più che mai quando la gara è in atto!

I begin the game with five Heroism count.EN: I begin the game with five Heroism counters.  When you play a Character with Hand Cost greater than or equal to my number of Heroism counters — Draw a card and I gain a Heroism counter.
I begin the game with five Heroism count.FR: Je commence la partie avec cinq compteurs Héroïsme.  Lorsque vous jouez un Personnage avec un Coût de Main supérieur ou égal à mon nombre de compteurs Héroïsme — Piochez une carte et je gagne un compteur Héroïsme.
I begin the game with five Heroism count.DE: Ich beginne das Spiel mit fünf Heldentumszählern.  Wenn du einen Charakter spielst, dessen Handkosten größer oder gleich meiner Anzahl an Heldentumszählern sind — Ziehe eine Karte und ich erhalte einen Heldentumszähler.
I begin the game with five Heroism count.ES: Comienzo la partida con cinco contadores de heroísmo.  Cuando juegues un personaje con coste desde la mano superior o igual a mi número de contadores de heroísmo — Tú robas una carta y yo gano un contador de heroísmo.
I begin the game with five Heroism count.IT: Inizio la partita con cinque segnalini Eroismo.  Quando giochi un personaggio con costo dalla mano pari o superiore al numero dei miei segnalini Eroismo — Pesca una carta e ottengo un segnalino Eroismo.

Every challenge is a blessing that lets.EN: Every challenge is a blessing that lets me rise even higher.
Every challenge is a blessing that lets.FR: Chaque défi est une bénédiction qui me permet de me hisser vers les sommets.
Every challenge is a blessing that lets.DE: Jede Herausforderung ist ein Segen, der mich zu noch größeren Höhen beflügelt.
Every challenge is a blessing that lets.ES: Cada desafío es una bendición que me ayuda a volar más alto.
Every challenge is a blessing that lets.IT: Ogni sfida è una benedizione che mi permette di salire ancora più in alto.

When a Character you control gains 1 or.EN: When a Character you control gains 1 or more boosts — You may exhaust me ({T}) to have target Character gain 1 boost$<BB>.
When a Character you control gains 1 or.FR: Lorsqu'un Personnage que vous contrôlez gagne au moins 1 boost — Vous pouvez m'épuiser ({T}) pour qu'un Personnage ciblé gagne 1 boost$<BB>.
When a Character you control gains 1 or.DE: Wenn ein Charakter, den du kontrollierst, mindestens 1 Verstärkung erhält — Du darfst mich erschöpfen ({T}), damit der Charakter deiner Wahl 1 Verstärkung$<BB> erhält.
When a Character you control gains 1 or.ES: Cuando un personaje que controles gane 1 potenciador o más — Puedes agotarme ({T}) para que un personaje objetivo gane 1 potenciador$<BB>.
When a Character you control gains 1 or.IT: Quando un personaggio che controlli ottiene 1 o più rinforzi — Puoi consumarmi ({T}) per far ottenere 1 rinforzo$<BB> a un personaggio bersaglio.

Only the worthy shall achieve true trans.EN: Only the worthy shall achieve true transcendence under my guidance.
Only the worthy shall achieve true trans.FR: Seuls les méritants pourront atteindre, sous ma direction, la véritable transcendance.
Only the worthy shall achieve true trans.DE: Nur die Würdigen werden unter meiner Führung wahre Transzendenz erreichen.
Only the worthy shall achieve true trans.ES: Solo los dignos que me sigan alcanzarán la verdadera trascendencia.
Only the worthy shall achieve true trans.IT: Solo chi ne sarà degno potrà raggiungere la vera trascendenza sotto la mia guida.

You’re nuts if you think you can keep up.EN: You’re nuts if you think you can keep up with this little one!
You’re nuts if you think you can keep up.FR: Il a beau être petit, mieux vaut ne pas lui chercher des noises.
You’re nuts if you think you can keep up.DE: Wenn du glaubst, dass du mit diesem Kleinen mithalten kannst, hast du nicht mehr alle Nüsse im Schrank!
You’re nuts if you think you can keep up.IT: Sei fuori di testa se credi di poter competere con questo piccoletto!

Small stature, big heart, immense advent.EN: Small stature, big heart, immense adventures.
Small stature, big heart, immense advent.FR: Petite taille, grand cœur, aventures infinies.
Small stature, big heart, immense advent.DE: Kleine Statur, großes Herz, riesige Abenteuer.
Small stature, big heart, immense advent.ES: Pequeño de estatura, grande de corazón, enorme espíritu aventurero.

When I leave the Expedition zone, if I'm.EN: When I leave the Expedition zone, if I'm <BOOSTED> — Put me in my owner's Mana zone (as an exhausted Mana Orb).  {R} I gain 1 boost.

When I leave the Expedition zone, if I'm.DE: Wenn ich die Expeditionszone verlasse und falls ich <BOOSTED> bin — Lege mich in die Manazone meines Besitzers (als erschöpfte Manakugel).  {R} Ich erhalte 1 Verstärkung.
When I leave the Expedition zone, if I'm.ES: Cuando abandone la zona de expedición, si estoy <BOOSTED> — Colócame en la zona de maná de mi propietario (como orbe de maná agotado).  {R} Gano 1 potenciador.

It may be a fire today — tomorrow it wil.EN: It may be a fire today — tomorrow it will be ashes.
It may be a fire today — tomorrow it wil.FR: Le feu qui semble éteint souvent dort sous la cendre...
It may be a fire today — tomorrow it wil.DE: Heute mag es brennen – morgen wird es Asche sein.
It may be a fire today — tomorrow it wil.ES: El fuego que parece extinto a menudo duerme bajo las cenizas.
It may be a fire today — tomorrow it wil.IT: Il fuoco che sembra spento spesso dorme sotto la cenere.

\"I only feel alive when I hear the wind.EN: "I only feel alive when I hear the wind whistling in my ears."
\"I only feel alive when I hear the wind.FR: "Je ne me sens vivante que quand j'entends le vent siffler à mes oreilles."
\"I only feel alive when I hear the wind.DE: "Ich fühle mich nur lebendig, wenn ich den Wind in meinen Ohren pfeifen höre."
\"I only feel alive when I hear the wind.ES: «El único momento en que me siento viva es cuando escucho el viento silbar en mis oídos».
\"I only feel alive when I hear the wind.IT: "Mi sento viva solo quando odo il vento soffiare nelle mie orecchie."

\"Stay on the path, they say. I make my.EN: "Stay on the path, they say. I make my own path!"
\"Stay on the path, they say. I make my.FR: "Reste sur le chemin, qu'ils disaient. Je trace mon propre chemin !"
\"Stay on the path, they say. I make my.DE: "'Bleib auf dem Weg', haben sie gesagt. Ich gehe meinen eigenen Weg!"
\"Stay on the path, they say. I make my.ES: «Dicen que es mejor no salirse del camino. ¡Yo trazo mi propio camino!».
\"Stay on the path, they say. I make my.IT: "Rimani sul sentiero, dicono. Ma il sentiero lo creo io!"

\"And now, pray, mark all these things w.EN: "And now, pray, mark all these things well in a wise heart."
\"And now, pray, mark all these things w.FR: "Et veuillez, je vous prie, retenir toutes ces choses dans un cœur averti."

Her determination has yet to meet its ma.FR: Sa détermination est sans égale dans ce monde.
Her determination has yet to meet its ma.DE: Ihre Entschlossenheit ist beispiellos auf dieser Welt.
Her determination has yet to meet its ma.ES: No ha nacido aún quien la iguale en su determinación.
Her determination has yet to meet its ma.IT: La sua determinazione non è ancora stata eguagliata in questo mondo.

\"Push through the pain. Giving up would.EN: "Push through the pain. Giving up would hurt far more."
\"Push through the pain. Giving up would.FR: "Affronte ta douleur. Abandonner fait bien plus mal."

\"Push through the pain. Giving up would.IT: "Sopporta il dolore. Arrendersi farebbe ancora più male."

\"We will be the arrow that pierces the.EN: "We will be the arrow that pierces the veil of the unknown, the torch that banishes the mists of ignorance!"
\"We will be the arrow that pierces the.FR: "Nous serons la flèche qui percera le voile de l’inconnu, le flambeau qui bannira les brumes de l’ignorance !"
\"We will be the arrow that pierces the.DE: "Wir werden der Pfeil sein, der den Schleier des Unbekannten durchstößt, und die Fackel, die die Nebel der Unwissenheit vertreibt!"
\"We will be the arrow that pierces the.ES: «¡Seremos la flecha que atraviesa el velo de lo desconocido, la antorcha que destierra las nieblas de la ignorancia!».
\"We will be the arrow that pierces the.IT: "Saremo la freccia che squarcia il velo dell'ignoto, la torcia che allontana la nebbia dell'ignoranza!"

{J} You may have another target Characte.EN: {J} You may have another target Character lose <FLEETING_CHAR> #and gain 1 boost#.
{J} You may have another target Characte.FR: {J} Vous pouvez faire perdre <FLEETING_CHAR> #et gagner 1 boost# à un autre Personnage ciblé.
{J} You may have another target Characte.DE: {J} Ein weiterer Charakter deiner Wahl darf $<FLEETING_CHAR> verlieren #und 1 Verstärkung erhalten#.
{J} You may have another target Characte.ES: {J} Puedes hacer que otro personaje objetivo pierda <FLEETING_CHAR> #y gane 1 potenciador#.
{J} You may have another target Characte.IT: {J} Puoi far perdere <FLEETING_CHAR> a un altro personaggio bersaglio #e fargli ottenere 1 rinforzo#.

Only the bravest can enter Haven..EN: Only the bravest can enter Haven.
Only the bravest can enter Haven..FR: Seuls les braves ont une place en Havre.
Only the bravest can enter Haven..DE: Nur die Tapfersten dürfen Haven betreten.
Only the bravest can enter Haven..ES: Solo los más valientes pueden entrar en el Refugio.
Only the bravest can enter Haven..IT: Solo i più audaci possono entrare nel Rifugio.

\"It seems Thoth has never seen me duel..EN: "It seems Thoth has never seen me duel."
\"It seems Thoth has never seen me duel..FR: "Il semblerait que Thot ne m'ait jamais vue combattre."
\"It seems Thoth has never seen me duel..DE: "Anscheinend hat Thoth mich noch nie im Duell erlebt."
\"It seems Thoth has never seen me duel..ES: «Por lo visto, Thoth nunca me ha visto batirme en duelo».
\"It seems Thoth has never seen me duel..IT: "Sembra che Thot non mi abbia mai visto duellare."

$<SEASONED_ME_FS>. {J} I gain 1 boost..EN: $<SEASONED_ME_FS>.  {J} I gain 1 boost.  #{R} If I have 4 boosts or less, I lose <FLEETING_CHAR>.#
$<SEASONED_ME_FS>. {J} I gain 1 boost..FR: $<SEASONED_ME_FS>.  {J} Je gagne 1 boost.  #{R} Si j'ai 4 boosts ou moins, je perds <FLEETING_CHAR>.#
$<SEASONED_ME_FS>. {J} I gain 1 boost..DE: $<SEASONED_ME_FS>.  {J} Ich erhalte 1 Verstärkung.  #{R} Falls ich 4 oder weniger Verstärkungen habe, verliere ich <FLEETING_CHAR>.#
$<SEASONED_ME_FS>. {J} I gain 1 boost..ES: $<SEASONED_ME_FS>.  {J} Gano 1 potenciador.  #{R} Si tengo 4 potenciadores o menos, pierdo <FLEETING_CHAR>.#

We've all lived through some things. But.EN: We've all lived through some things. But she's been through worse.
We've all lived through some things. But.FR: "Tu penses avoir traversé ton lot d'épreuves ? J'ai connu bien pire."
We've all lived through some things. But.DE: Wir haben alle schon einiges durchgemacht. Aber sie hat Schlimmeres durchgemacht.
We've all lived through some things. But.ES: Todos hemos vivido momentos oscuros, pero ella ha sobrevivido a cosas mucho peores.
We've all lived through some things. But.IT: Tutti abbiamo superato qualche avversità. Ma lei ha affrontato di peggio.

Ever the trickster, always the rebel..EN: Ever the trickster, always the rebel.
Ever the trickster, always the rebel..DE: Immer der Schwindler, immer der Rebell.
Ever the trickster, always the rebel..IT: Sempre un mistificatore, sempre un ribelle.

When I leave the Expedition zone — You m.EN: When I leave the Expedition zone — You may put me in my owner's Mana zone (as an exhausted Mana Orb).
When I leave the Expedition zone — You m.FR: Lorsque je quitte la zone d'Expédition — Vous pouvez me mettre dans la zone de Mana de mon propriétaire (en tant qu'Orbe de Mana épuisé).
When I leave the Expedition zone — You m.DE: Wenn ich die Expeditionszone verlasse — Du darfst mich in die Manazone meines Besitzers legen (als erschöpfte Manakugel).
When I leave the Expedition zone — You m.ES: Cuando abandone la zona de expedición — Puedes colocarme en la zona de maná de mi propietario (como orbe de maná agotado).
When I leave the Expedition zone — You m.IT: Quando lascio l'area delle spedizioni — Puoi mettermi nell'area del mana del mio proprietario (come una sfera di mana consumata).

A single spark can start a wildfire..EN: A single spark can start a wildfire.
A single spark can start a wildfire..FR: ... Qui l'ose réveiller peut s'en laisser surprendre.
A single spark can start a wildfire..DE: Ein einziger Funke kann einen Flächenbrand auslösen.
A single spark can start a wildfire..ES: Cualquiera que se atreva a despertar el fuego habrá de sorprenderse.
A single spark can start a wildfire..IT: Per scatenare un incendio basta una scintilla.

When I leave the Expedition zone — You m.EN: When I leave the Expedition zone — You may put me in my owner's Mana zone (as an exhausted Mana Orb). #If you don't, draw a card.#
When I leave the Expedition zone — You m.FR: Lorsque je quitte la zone d'Expédition — Vous pouvez me mettre dans la zone de Mana de mon propriétaire (en tant qu'Orbe de Mana épuisé). #Si vous ne le faites pas, piochez une carte.#
When I leave the Expedition zone — You m.DE: Wenn ich die Expeditionszone verlasse — Du darfst mich in die Manazone meines Besitzers legen (als erschöpfte Manakugel). #Falls du es nicht tust, ziehe eine Karte.#
When I leave the Expedition zone — You m.ES: Cuando abandone la zona de expedición — Puedes colocarme en la zona de maná de mi propietario (como orbe de maná agotado). #Si no lo haces, roba una carta.#
When I leave the Expedition zone — You m.IT: Quando lascio l'area delle spedizioni — Puoi mettermi nell'area del mana del mio proprietario (come una sfera di mana consumata). #Se non lo fai, pesca una carta.#

Not even the weight of the sky could mak.EN: Not even the weight of the sky could make him buckle.
Not even the weight of the sky could mak.FR: Le poids du ciel ne saurait lui faire courber l'échine.
Not even the weight of the sky could mak.DE: Nicht einmal das Gewicht des Himmels konnte ihn zur Unterwerfung zwingen.
Not even the weight of the sky could mak.ES: Ni el peso del cielo le hará doblegarse.
Not even the weight of the sky could mak.IT: Nemmeno il peso del cielo riuscirebbe a piegarlo.

#{D} : The next Character you play this.EN: #{D} : The next Character you play this turn gains 2 boosts.# (Discard me from Reserve to do this.)
#{D} : The next Character you play this.FR: #{D} : Le prochain Personnage que vous jouez ce tour gagne 2 boosts.# (Défaussez-moi de la Réserve pour ça.)
#{D} : The next Character you play this.DE: #{D} : Der nächste Charakter, den du in dieser Runde spielst, erhält 2 Verstärkungen.# (Lege mich aus der Reserve ab, um diese Aktion auszuführen.)
#{D} : The next Character you play this.ES: #{D}: El siguiente personaje que juegues este turno gana 2 potenciadores.# (Descártame de la reserva para hacer esto.)
#{D} : The next Character you play this.IT: #{D}: il prossimo personaggio che giochi in questo turno ottiene 2 rinforzi.# (Scartami dalla Riserva per giocare questa azione.)

\"Many things lie between us—shadowy mou.EN: "Many things lie between us—shadowy mountains and sounding sea."
\"Many things lie between us—shadowy mou.FR: "Une mer tumultueuse et des montagnes ombragées d'arbres nous séparent."
\"Many things lie between us—shadowy mou.DE: Indes viel Raumes uns sondert, waldbeschattete Berg', und des Meers weitrauschende Wogen.
\"Many things lie between us—shadowy mou.ES: «La parte más pesada de la impetuosa guerra la sostienen mis manos».
\"Many things lie between us—shadowy mou.IT: "Sono fra l’isola e loro molte montagne ombrose, e il mare dall’eco sonora."

Be careful what you wish for. There are.EN: Be careful what you wish for. There are challenges that even the Bravos prefer to avoid.
Be careful what you wish for. There are.FR: Attention à ce que tu souhaites. Il est des dangers que même les Bravos préfèrent éviter.
Be careful what you wish for. There are.DE: Bedenke gut, was du dir wünschst. Es gibt Herausforderungen, die selbst die Bravos lieber vermeiden.
Be careful what you wish for. There are.ES: Ten cuidado con lo que deseas. Hay desafíos que incluso en Bravos prefieren evitar.
Be careful what you wish for. There are.IT: Bisogna stare attenti a ciò che si desidera. Ci sono sfide che persino i Bravos preferiscono evitare.

I can't be played if you have less than.EN: I can't be played if you have less than seven Mana Orbs.
I can't be played if you have less than.FR: Je ne peux pas être jouée si vous avez moins de sept Orbes de Mana.
I can't be played if you have less than.DE: Ich kann nicht gespielt werden, falls du weniger als sieben Manakugeln hast.
I can't be played if you have less than.ES: No puedes jugarme si tienes menos de siete orbes de maná.
I can't be played if you have less than.IT: Non puoi giocarmi se hai meno di sette sfere di mana.

For only the most gifted of Alterers cou.EN: For only the most gifted of Alterers could bring humanity's long-remembered legends to life.
For only the most gifted of Alterers cou.FR: Seuls les Altérateurs et Altératrices les plus doués peuvent donner vie aux légendes gravées dans la mémoire de l'humanité.
For only the most gifted of Alterers cou.DE: Nur die begabtesten Alterer können die längst vergessenen Legenden der Menschheit zum Leben erwecken.
For only the most gifted of Alterers cou.ES: Pues tan solo los más prodigiosos de los Alteradores serían capaces de hacer que las leyendas más recordadas de la humanidad cobrasen vida.
For only the most gifted of Alterers cou.IT: Giacché solo i più talentuosi degli alterer potevano dare vita alle leggende a lungo narrate dall'umanità.

I can't be played if you have less than.EN: I can't be played if you have less than #six Mana Orbs#.
I can't be played if you have less than.FR: Je ne peux pas être jouée si vous avez moins de #six Orbes de Mana#.
I can't be played if you have less than.DE: Ich kann nicht gespielt werden, falls du #weniger als sechs# Manakugeln hast.
I can't be played if you have less than.ES: No puedes jugarme si tienes menos de #seis orbes de maná#.
I can't be played if you have less than.IT: Non puoi giocarmi se hai meno di #sei sfere di mana#.

100 crunches, 100 push-ups, 100 squats,.EN: 100 crunches, 100 push-ups, 100 squats, a 10-km run and a desire to prove yourself. Just your typical morning of Bravos training.
100 crunches, 100 push-ups, 100 squats,.FR: 100 pompes, 100 abdos, 100 squats,10 km de course à pied et le désir de faire ses preuves : l'entraînement typique des Bravos.
100 crunches, 100 push-ups, 100 squats,.DE: 100 Crunches, 100 Liegestütze, 100 Kniebeugen, ein 10-Kilometer-Lauf und der Wunsch, sich zu beweisen: ein ganz normaler Bravos-Trainingsmorgen.
100 crunches, 100 push-ups, 100 squats,.ES: 100 abdominales, 100 flexiones, 100 sentadillas, correr 10 kilómetros y el deseo de ponerte a prueba. La típica rutina de entrenamiento matutino en Bravos.
100 crunches, 100 push-ups, 100 squats,.IT: 100 addominali, 100 flessioni, 100 squat, 10 chilometri di corsa e il desiderio di metterti alla prova: una tipica mattinata di allenamento dei Bravos.

There's only one way to turn the tide: b.EN: There's only one way to turn the tide: by becoming stronger.
There's only one way to turn the tide: b.FR: Il n'y a qu'une seule façon d'éviter la débâcle : devenir plus fort.
There's only one way to turn the tide: b.DE: Es gibt nur einen Weg, das Ruder herumzureißen: Stärke sammeln!
There's only one way to turn the tide: b.ES: Solo hay una forma de hacer frente a la marea del conflicto: volverse más fuerte.
There's only one way to turn the tide: b.IT: C'è solo un modo di cambiare le sorti: diventare più forte.

Put the top #two cards# of your deck in.EN: Put the top #two cards# of your deck in your Mana zone (as exhausted Mana Orbs).
Put the top #two cards# of your deck in.FR: Mettez #les deux premières cartes# de votre deck dans votre zone de Mana (en tant qu'Orbes de Mana épuisés).

The terrible beast shrank and cowered be.EN: The terrible beast shrank and cowered before the might of the Bravos.
The terrible beast shrank and cowered be.FR: La terrible bête se recroquevilla en tremblant devant la force des Bravos.
The terrible beast shrank and cowered be.DE: Die schreckliche Bestie wich zurück und beugte sich der Macht der Bravos.
The terrible beast shrank and cowered be.ES: La terrible bestia se achantó y tembló ante el poder de los de Bravos.
The terrible beast shrank and cowered be.IT: L'orribile bestia si contrasse e indietreggiò di fronte alla potenza dei Bravos.

Flames fly from his hand as he falls tow.EN: Flames fly from his hand as he falls towards the monster, leaving a trail of glowing fire behind him...
Flames fly from his hand as he falls tow.FR: Des flammes jaillissent de sa main alors qu’il chute en direction du monstre, laissant derrière lui une traînée incandescente…
Flames fly from his hand as he falls tow.DE: Flammen sprühen aus seiner Hand, während er auf das Monster zustürzt und eine Spur aus glühendem Feuer hinter sich herzieht …
Flames fly from his hand as he falls tow.ES: Sus manos expulsan llamas mientras cae sobre el monstruo, dejando tras de sí un rastro de fuego refulgente...
Flames fly from his hand as he falls tow.IT: Le fiamme volano dalla sua mano mentre scende verso il mostro, lasciandosi dietro una scia di fuoco incandescente...

Haven isn't where legends are born... it.EN: Haven isn't where legends are born... it's where they live forever.
Haven isn't where legends are born... it.FR: Havre n'est pas le lieu où naissent les légendes. C'est le lieu où elles deviennent immortelles.
Haven isn't where legends are born... it.DE: In Haven werden keine Legenden geboren: Sie leben hier, auf immer und ewig.
Haven isn't where legends are born... it.ES: El Refugio no es donde nacen las leyendas... es donde viven para toda la eternidad.
Haven isn't where legends are born... it.IT: Il Rifugio non è dove nascono le leggende, ma dove vivono in eterno.

A Hero can practice Alteration through t.EN: A Hero can practice Alteration through their Companion, no matter the distance between them.
A Hero can practice Alteration through t.FR: Quelle que soit la distance, un Altérateur peut se servir de son Alter Ego comme vecteur de matérialisation.
A Hero can practice Alteration through t.DE: Ein Held kann durch seinen Gefährten Alteration praktizieren – unabhängig von der Entfernung zwischen ihnen.
A Hero can practice Alteration through t.ES: Un héroe puede practicar la alteración a través de su compañero, sea cual sea la distancia que los separe.
A Hero can practice Alteration through t.IT: Un eroe può servirsi del suo compagno come vettore di alterazione, indipendentemente dalla distanza che li separa.

{T} : Target a Character you control, th.EN: {T} : Target a Character you control, then roll a die. On a:  • 6+, it gains <ANCHORED>. (During Rest, it doesn't go to Reserve and it loses Anchored.)  • 2-5, it gains 1 boost. (A boost is a +1/+1/+1 counter. Remove it when it leaves the Expedition zone.)  • 1, send it to Reserve.
{T} : Target a Character you control, th.FR: {T} : Ciblez un Personnage que vous contrôlez, puis lancez un dé. Sur :  • 6+, il gagne <ANCHORED>. (Au Repos, il ne va pas en Réserve et il perd Ancré.)  • 2-5, il gagne 1 boost. (Un boost est un compteur +1/+1/+1. Retirez-le lorsqu'il quitte la zone d'Expédition.)  • 1, envoyez-le en Réserve.
{T} : Target a Character you control, th.DE: {T} : Wähle einen Charakter, den du kontrollierst, und würfle einmal. Bei:  • 6+ erhält er <ANCHORED>. (Während der Ruhepause geht er nicht in die Reserve und verliert Verankert.)  • 2-5 erhält er 1 Verstärkung. (Eine Verstärkung ist ein +1/+1/+1-Zähler. Entferne sie, wenn sie die Expeditionszone verlässt.)  • 1 geht er in die Reserve.
{T} : Target a Character you control, th.ES: {T}: Haz objetivo a un personaje que controles y luego tira un dado. Si sacas:  • 6+, gana <ANCHORED>. (Durante el descanso, no va a la reserva y pierde anclaje.)  • 2-5, gana 1 potenciador. (Un potenciador es un contador +1/+1/+1. Retíralo cuando abandone la zona de expedición.)  • 1, envíalo a la reserva.
{T} : Target a Character you control, th.IT: {T}: scegli come bersaglio un personaggio che controlli, poi lancia un dado. Con:  • 6+, ottiene <ANCHORED>. (Durante il riposo, non va nella Riserva e perde Ancorato.)  • 2-5, ottiene 1 rinforzo. (Un rinforzo è un segnalino +1/+1/+1. Rimuovilo quando lascia l'area delle spedizioni.)  • 1, mandalo nella Riserva.

Chaos can bring disappointment, sure, bu.EN: Chaos can bring disappointment, sure, but it's also where ye'll find the most wonderfullest hidden gems!
Chaos can bring disappointment, sure, bu.FR: Le chaos est source de désillusions, mais recèle aussi les plus belles pépites !
Chaos can bring disappointment, sure, bu.DE: Chaos kann Enttäuschungen mit sich bringen, aber es ist auch der Ort, an dem man die wunderbarsten Schätze entdeckt!
Chaos can bring disappointment, sure, bu.ES: Sí, el caos puede ser una lata, ¡pero también contiene las gemas ocultas más maravillásticas!
Chaos can bring disappointment, sure, bu.IT: Il caos può portare delusione, certo, ma è lì che troverai le gemme nascoste più spettacolose!

When you play a Character with a base st.EN: When you play a Character with a base statistic of 0 — I gain a Performance counter.  At Noon — You may spend five of my Performance counters to reveal the top card of your deck. You may play it for free or put it into your hand. (Don't activate any {h} triggers.)
When you play a Character with a base st.FR: Lorsque vous jouez un Personnage avec une statistique de base 0 — Je gagne un compteur Spectacle.  À Midi — Vous pouvez dépenser cinq de mes compteurs Spectacle pour révéler la première carte de votre deck. Vous pouvez la jouer gratuitement ou la mettre dans votre main. (N'activez pas de déclencheurs {h}.)
When you play a Character with a base st.DE: Wenn du einen Charakter mit einer Basisstatistik von 0 spielst — Ich erhalte einen Auftrittszähler.  Zum Mittag – Du darfst fünf meiner Auftrittszähler ausgeben, um die oberste Karte deines Decks aufzudecken. Du darfst sie kostenlos spielen oder sie in deine Hand aufnehmen. (Aktiviere keine {h} Auslöser.)
When you play a Character with a base st.ES: Cuando juegues un personaje con una estadística básica de 0 — Gano un contador de actuación.  Al mediodía — Puedes gastar cinco de mis contadores de actuación para revelar la primera carta de tu mazo. Puedes jugarla sin coste o colocarla en tu mano. (No actives ningún efecto disparado {h}.)
When you play a Character with a base st.IT: Quando giochi un personaggio con una statistica base di 0 — Ottengo un segnalino Prestazione.  A mezzogiorno — Puoi spendere cinque dei miei segnalini Prestazione per rivelare la prima carta del tuo mazzo. Puoi giocarla senza pagarne il costo o aggiungerla alla tua mano. (Non attivi alcun innesco {h}.)

True beauty lies outside of the conventi.EN: True beauty lies outside of the conventional.
True beauty lies outside of the conventi.FR: La véritable beauté est celle qui existe en marge des conventions.
True beauty lies outside of the conventi.DE: Wahre Schönheit liegt jenseits des Konventionellen.
True beauty lies outside of the conventi.ES: La auténtica belleza se halla fuera de lo convencional.
True beauty lies outside of the conventi.IT: La vera bellezza sta al di fuori delle convenzioni.

During Morning, draw only one card. Then.EN: During Morning, draw only one card. Then, put the top card of your deck in your Mana zone instead of a card from your hand.  At Noon — $<RESUPPLY>.  Ignore my abilities during the first Day.
During Morning, draw only one card. Then.FR: Le Matin, piochez une seule carte. Puis, mettez la première carte de votre deck dans votre zone de Mana, au lieu d'une carte de votre main.  À Midi — $<RESUPPLY>.  Ignorez mes capacités le premier Jour.
During Morning, draw only one card. Then.DE: Am Morgen ziehe nur eine Karte. Dann lege statt einer Karte aus deiner Hand die oberste Karte deines Decks in deine Manazone.  Zum Mittag — $<RESUPPLY>.  Ignoriere meine Fähigkeiten während des ersten Tages.
During Morning, draw only one card. Then.ES: Durante la mañana, roba una sola carta. Luego, coloca la primera carta de tu mazo en tu zona de maná en lugar de una carta de tu mano.  Al mediodía — $<RESUPPLY>.  Ignora mis habilidades durante el primer día.
During Morning, draw only one card. Then.IT: Durante la mattina, pesca solo una carta. Poi metti la prima carta del tuo mazzo nella tua area del mana invece di una carta dalla tua mano.  A mezzogiorno — $<RESUPPLY>.  Ignora le mie abilità durante la prima giornata.

When you listen to the voice of the Wind.EN: When you listen to the voice of the Wind, it always carries you where you're meant to be.
When you listen to the voice of the Wind.FR: Quand on écoute la voix du Vent, il nous porte toujours là où nous sommes censés être.
When you listen to the voice of the Wind.DE: Wenn du auf die Stimme des Windes hörst, trägt er dich immer dorthin, wo du sein sollst.
When you listen to the voice of the Wind.ES: Cuando escuchas la voz del viento, siempre te lleva allí donde el destino te espera.
When you listen to the voice of the Wind.IT: Quando ascolti la voce del vento, essa ti porta sempre dove dovresti essere.

Hope you're not afraid of heights!.EN: Hope you're not afraid of heights!
Hope you're not afraid of heights!.DE: Ich hoffe, du hast keine Höhenangst!
Hope you're not afraid of heights!.IT: Spero che tu non soffra di vertigini!

{H} #Each Character controlled by target.EN: {H} #Each Character controlled by target player# gains <FLEETING_CHAR>. (If it would be sent to Reserve, discard it instead.)
{H} #Each Character controlled by target.FR: {H}#Chaque Personnage contrôlé par le joueur ciblé# gagne <FLEETING_CHAR>. (S'il devait être envoyé en Réserve, défaussez-le à la place.)
{H} #Each Character controlled by target.DE: {H} #Jeder Charakter, der von einem Spieler deiner Wahl kontrolliert wird#, erhält <FLEETING_CHAR>. (Falls er in die Reserve geschickt werden soll, lege ihn stattdessen ab.)
{H} #Each Character controlled by target.ES: {H} #Cada personaje controlado por un jugador objetivo# gana <FLEETING_CHAR>. (Si fuese a ir a la reserva, en vez de eso, descártalo.)
{H} #Each Character controlled by target.IT: {H} #Ogni personaggio controllato da un giocatore bersaglio# ottiene <FLEETING_CHAR>. (Se sta per finire nella Riserva, scartalo invece.)

{H} Up to one target Character gains <AS.EN: {H} Up to one target Character gains <ASLEEP>. (During Dusk, ignore its statistics. During Rest, it doesn't go to Reserve and it loses Asleep.)
{H} Up to one target Character gains <AS.FR: {H} Jusqu'à un Personnage ciblé gagne <ASLEEP>. (Au Crépuscule, ignorez ses statistiques. Au Repos, il ne va pas en Réserve et il perd Endormi.)
{H} Up to one target Character gains <AS.DE: {H} Bis zu ein Charakter deiner Wahl erhält <ASLEEP>. (Am Abend ignoriere seine Statistiken. Während der Ruhepause geht er nicht in die Reserve und verliert Schlafend.)
{H} Up to one target Character gains <AS.ES: {H} Hasta un personaje objetivo gana <ASLEEP>. (Durante el anochecer, ignora sus estadísticas. Durante el descanso, no va a la reserva y pierde sueño.)
{H} Up to one target Character gains <AS.IT: {H} Fino a un personaggio bersaglio ottiene <ASLEEP>. (Durante il crepuscolo, ignora le sue statistiche. Durante il riposo, non va nella Riserva e perde Dormiente.)

\"Sand gives you a taste of what life is.EN: "Sand gives you a taste of what life is all about. Come morning, the castles you have built will be gone with the tide."
\"Sand gives you a taste of what life is.FR: "Le sable est un avant-goût de ce qu'est la vie. Au matin, les châteaux érigés disparaissent avec la marée."
\"Sand gives you a taste of what life is.DE: "Sand gibt dir einen Vorgeschmack auf das, was das Leben ausmacht. Morgen früh werden die Schlösser, die du gebaut hast, mit der Flut verschwunden sein."
\"Sand gives you a taste of what life is.ES: «La arena es una metáfora perfecta de la vida. Al llegar la mañana, los castillos que construiste el día anterior habrán sido arrastrados por la marea».
\"Sand gives you a taste of what life is.IT: "La sabbia ti dà un assaggio di come va la vita. Domani mattina, i castelli che hai costruito se ne saranno andati con la marea."

{H} Up to one target Character gains <AS.EN: {H} Up to one target Character gains <ASLEEP>. #You may have it gain 2 boosts.# (During Dusk, ignore its statistics. During Rest, it doesn't go to Reserve and it loses Asleep.)
{H} Up to one target Character gains <AS.FR: {H} Jusqu'à un Personnage ciblé gagne <ASLEEP>. #Vous pouvez lui faire gagner 2 boosts.# (Au Crépuscule, ignorez ses statistiques. Au Repos, il ne va pas en Réserve et il perd Endormi.)
{H} Up to one target Character gains <AS.DE: {H} Bis zu ein Charakter deiner Wahl erhält <ASLEEP>. #Du darfst ihn 2 Verstärkungen erhalten lassen.# (Am Abend ignoriere seine Statistiken. Während der Ruhepause geht er nicht in die Reserve und verliert Schlafend.)
{H} Up to one target Character gains <AS.ES: {H} Hasta un personaje objetivo gana <ASLEEP>. #Puedes hacer que gane 2 potenciadores.# (Durante el anochecer, ignora sus estadísticas. Durante el descanso, no va a la reserva y pierde sueño.)
{H} Up to one target Character gains <AS.IT: {H} Fino a un personaggio bersaglio ottiene <ASLEEP>. #Puoi fargli ottenere 2 rinforzi.# (Durante il crepuscolo, ignora le sue statistiche. Durante il riposo, non va nella Riserva e perde Dormiente.)

Eidolon or human, we are all shaped by s.EN: Eidolon or human, we are all shaped by stories. They're the building blocks of our identity.
Eidolon or human, we are all shaped by s.FR: Eidolon ou humain, nous sommes tous façonnés par les histoires. Ce sont elles qui font de nous qui nous sommes.
Eidolon or human, we are all shaped by s.DE: Ob Eidolon oder Mensch, wir alle sind von Geschichten geformt. Sie sind die Bausteine unserer Identität.
Eidolon or human, we are all shaped by s.ES: Eidolones o humanos, a todos nos dan forma las historias. Son las piezas con las que se construye nuestra identidad.
Eidolon or human, we are all shaped by s.IT: Eidolon o umani, siamo tutti plasmati da storie. Sono i mattoni della nostra identità.

{H} Roll a die. On a 4+, draw a card. On.EN: {H} Roll a die. On a 4+, draw a card. On a 1-3, $<RESUPPLY_LOW>.
{H} Roll a die. On a 4+, draw a card. On.FR: {H} Lancez un dé. Sur 4+, piochez une carte. Sur 1-3, $<RESUPPLY_LOW>.
{H} Roll a die. On a 4+, draw a card. On.DE: {H} Würfle einmal. Bei 4+ ziehe eine Karte. Bei 1–3 $<RESUPPLY_LOW>.
{H} Roll a die. On a 4+, draw a card. On.ES: {H} Tira un dado. Si sacas 4+, roba una carta. Si sacas 1-3, $<RESUPPLY_LOW>.
{H} Roll a die. On a 4+, draw a card. On.IT: {H} Lancia un dado. Con 4+, pesca una carta. Con 1-3, $<RESUPPLY_LOW>.

{D} : Target Character with Hand Cost {3.EN: {D} : Target Character with Hand Cost {3} or less gains <ANCHORED>. (Discard me from Reserve to do this.)
{D} : Target Character with Hand Cost {3.FR: {D} : Un Personnage ciblé de Coût de Main {3} ou moins gagne <ANCHORED>. (Défaussez-moi de la Réserve pour ça.)
{D} : Target Character with Hand Cost {3.DE: {D} : Ein Charakter deiner Wahl mit Handkosten {3} oder weniger erhält <ANCHORED>. (Lege mich aus der Reserve ab, um diese Aktion auszuführen.)
{D} : Target Character with Hand Cost {3.ES: {D}: Un personaje objetivo con coste desde la mano de {3} o menos gana <ANCHORED>. (Descártame de la reserva para hacer esto.)
{D} : Target Character with Hand Cost {3.IT: {D}: un personaggio bersaglio con costo dalla mano pari o inferiore a {3} ottiene <ANCHORED>. (Scartami dalla Riserva per giocare questa azione.)

\"You can draw water out of a water-well.EN: "You can draw water out of a water-well, so I should think you could draw treacle out of a treacle-well — eh, stupid ?"
\"You can draw water out of a water-well.FR: "Quand il y a de l’eau dans un puits, vous savez bien comment on en tire, n’est-ce pas ? Eh bien ! d’un puits de mélasse on s'en tire de même, comprenez-vous, petite sotte ?"
\"You can draw water out of a water-well.DE: "Man kann Wasser aus einem Wasserbrunnen pumpen. Also kann man doch wohl Sirup aus einem Sirupbrunnen pumpen – nicht, Dummchen?"
\"You can draw water out of a water-well.ES: «Uno puede sacar agua de un pozo de agua, ¿por qué no va a poder sacar melaza de un pozo de melaza? ¡No seas estúpida!».
\"You can draw water out of a water-well.IT: "Come si estrae l'acqua dal pozzo, si potrà estrarre la melassa da un pozzo di melassa, credo... eh, stupida?"

{J} You may discard a card from your Res.EN: {J} You may discard a card from your Reserve to draw a card.
{J} You may discard a card from your Res.FR: {J} Vous pouvez défausser une carte de votre Réserve pour piocher une carte.
{J} You may discard a card from your Res.DE: {J} Du darfst eine Karte aus deiner Reserve ablegen, um eine Karte zu ziehen.
{J} You may discard a card from your Res.ES: {J} Puedes descartar una carta de tu reserva para robar una carta.
{J} You may discard a card from your Res.IT: {J} Puoi scartare una carta dalla tua Riserva per pescare una carta.

The old world is dying, and the new worl.EN: The old world is dying, and the new world struggles to be born: now is the time of monsters.
The old world is dying, and the new worl.FR: L'ancien monde se meurt et le nouveau monde peine à naître : voici venir l'âge des monstres.
The old world is dying, and the new worl.DE: Die alte Welt liegt im Sterben, die neue ist noch nicht geboren. Es ist die Zeit der Monster.
The old world is dying, and the new worl.ES: El viejo mundo se muere, el nuevo tarda en aparecer. Y en ese claroscuro surgen los monstruos.
The old world is dying, and the new worl.IT: Il vecchio mondo sta morendo e il nuovo mondo lotta per nascere: è l'era dei mostri.

{J} You may discard #any number of cards.EN: {J} You may discard #any number of cards# from your Reserve to #draw that many cards#.
{J} You may discard #any number of cards.FR: {J} Vous pouvez défausser #autant de cartes que vous le voulez# de votre Réserve pour #piocher le même nombre de cartes#.
{J} You may discard #any number of cards.DE: {J} Du darfst #eine beliebige Anzahl von Karten# aus deiner Reserve ablegen und danach #die gleiche Anzahl an Karten ziehen#.
{J} You may discard #any number of cards.ES: {J} Puedes descartar #cualquier número de cartas# de tu reserva para #robar ese mismo número de cartas#.
{J} You may discard #any number of cards.IT: {J} Puoi scartare #un qualsiasi numero di carte# dalla tua Riserva per #pescare altrettante carte#.

Up above the world so high, like a diamo.EN: Up above the world so high, like a diamond in the sky.
Up above the world so high, like a diamo.DE: Hoch über der Welt – so hoch wie ein Diamant am Himmel.
Up above the world so high, like a diamo.ES: En el cielo y en el mar, un diamante de verdad.
Up above the world so high, like a diamo.IT: Brilla, brilla sopra noi, mi domando di chi sei.

#$<FLEETING>.# #All Characters in targe.EN: #$<FLEETING>.#  #All Characters in target Expedition# gain <ASLEEP>. (This only affects one player's Characters. During Dusk, ignore their statistics. During Rest, they don't go to Reserve and they lose Asleep.)

There's a time to be cautious, and a tim.IT: C'è un momento per essere cauti e un momento per scommettere tutto!
