$<FLEETING>. You may discard a card fro.DE: $<FLEETING>.  Du darfst eine Karte aus deiner Reserve ablegen, um meine Kosten um #{1}# zu reduzieren.  Lege einen Charakter oder eine bleibende Karte deiner Wahl oben auf das Deck ihres Besitzers zurück.
$<FLEETING>. You may discard a card fro.ES: $<FLEETING>.  Puedes descartar una carta de tu reserva para reducir mi coste en #{1}#.  Devuelve un personaje o permanente objetivo a la parte superior del mazo de su propietario.
$<FLEETING>. You may discard a card fro.IT: $<FLEETING>.  Puoi scartare una carta dalla tua Riserva per ridurre il mio costo di #{1}#.  Fai tornare un personaggio o un permanente bersaglio in cima al mazzo del suo proprietario.

$<FLEETING>. Reveal the top four cards.EN: $<FLEETING>.  Reveal the top four cards of your Deck. Choose up to two Characters from these cards and put them in your Expeditions. They gain <FLEETING>. Discard the other cards. (Don't activate any {h} triggers.)
$<FLEETING>. Reveal the top four cards.FR: $<FLEETING>.  Révélez les quatre premières cartes de votre deck. Choisissez jusqu'à deux Personnages parmi ces cartes et mettez-les dans vos Expéditions. Ils gagnent <FLEETING>. Défaussez les autres cartes. (N'activez pas de déclencheurs {h}.)
$<FLEETING>. Reveal the top four cards.DE: $<FLEETING>.  Decke die obersten vier Karten deines Decks auf. Wähle bis zu zwei Charaktere aus diesen Karten und lege sie in deine Expeditionen. Sie erhalten <FLEETING>. Lege die anderen Karten ab. (Aktiviere keine {h} Auslöser.)
$<FLEETING>. Reveal the top four cards.ES: $<FLEETING>.  Revela las cuatro primeras cartas de tu mazo. Elige hasta dos personajes entre estas cartas y colócalos en tus expediciones. Ganan <FLEETING>. Descarta las otras cartas. (No actives ningún efecto disparado {h}.)
$<FLEETING>. Reveal the top four cards.IT: $<FLEETING>.  Rivela le prime quattro carte del tuo mazzo. Scegli fino a due personaggi tra queste carte e mettili nelle tue spedizioni. Ottengono <FLEETING>. Scarta le altre carte. (Non attivi alcun innesco {h}.)

Who looks outside, dreams; who looks ins.EN: Who looks outside, dreams; who looks inside, awakes.
Who looks outside, dreams; who looks ins.FR: Celui qui regarde à l'extérieur rêve, celui qui regarde à l'intérieur s'éveille.
Who looks outside, dreams; who looks ins.DE: Wer nach außen schaut, träumt. Wer nach innen schaut, erwacht.
Who looks outside, dreams; who looks ins.ES: Quien mira hacia fuera sueña, quien mira hacia adentro despierta.
Who looks outside, dreams; who looks ins.IT: Chi guarda fuori, sogna. Chi guarda dentro, si sveglia.

<FLEETING>. Reveal the top four cards o.EN: <FLEETING>.  Reveal the top four cards of your Deck. Choose up to two Characters from these cards and put them in your Expeditions. They gain <FLEETING>. Discard the other cards. (Don't activate any {h} triggers.)
<FLEETING>. Reveal the top four cards o.FR: <FLEETING>.  Révélez les quatre premières cartes de votre deck. Choisissez jusqu'à deux Personnages parmi ces cartes et mettez-les dans vos Expéditions. Ils gagnent <FLEETING>. Défaussez les autres cartes. (N'activez pas de déclencheurs {h}.)
<FLEETING>. Reveal the top four cards o.DE: <FLEETING>.  Decke die obersten vier Karten deines Decks auf. Wähle bis zu zwei Charaktere aus diesen Karten und lege sie in deine Expeditionen. Sie erhalten <FLEETING>. Lege die anderen Karten ab. (Aktiviere keine {h} Auslöser.)
<FLEETING>. Reveal the top four cards o.ES: <FLEETING>.  Revela las cuatro primeras cartas de tu mazo. Elige hasta dos personajes entre estas cartas y colócalos en tus expediciones. Ganan <FLEETING>. Descarta las otras cartas. (No actives ningún efecto disparado {h}.)
<FLEETING>. Reveal the top four cards o.IT: <FLEETING>.  Rivela le prime quattro carte del tuo mazzo. Scegli fino a due personaggi tra queste carte e mettili nelle tue spedizioni. Ottengono <FLEETING>. Scarta le altre carte. (Non attivi alcun innesco {h}.)

$<FLEETING>. All Characters you control.EN: $<FLEETING>.  All Characters you control switch Expeditions. (They leave their Expeditions and join their controller's other Expedition.)
$<FLEETING>. All Characters you control.FR: $<FLEETING>.  Chaque Personnage que vous contrôlez change d'Expédition. (Il quitte son Expédition et rejoint l'autre Expédition de son contrôleur.)
$<FLEETING>. All Characters you control.DE: $<FLEETING>.  Alle Charaktere, die du kontrollierst, wechseln die Expeditionen. (Sie verlassen ihre Expeditionen und schließen sich der anderen Expedition des kontrollierenden Spielers an.)
$<FLEETING>. All Characters you control.ES: $<FLEETING>.  Todos los personajes que controles se trasladan de expedición. (Abandonan su expedición y se incorporan a la otra expedición de su controlador.)
$<FLEETING>. All Characters you control.IT: $<FLEETING>.  Tutti i personaggi che controlli cambiano spedizione. (Lasciano la loro spedizione e si uniscono all'altra spedizione del loro controllore.)

The Lyra never play by the rules..EN: The Lyra never play by the rules.
The Lyra never play by the rules..FR: Les Lyra refusent de se laisser contraindre par les règles.
The Lyra never play by the rules..DE: Die Lyra halten sich nie an die Regeln.
The Lyra never play by the rules..ES: Los de Lyra nunca siguen las reglas.
The Lyra never play by the rules..IT: I Lyra non giocano mai secondo le regole.

$<FLEETING>. All Characters #controlled.EN: $<FLEETING>.  All Characters #controlled by target player# switch Expeditions. (They leave their Expeditions and join their controller's other Expedition.)
$<FLEETING>. All Characters #controlled.FR: $<FLEETING>.  Chaque Personnage #contrôlé par le joueur ciblé# change d'Expédition. (Il quitte son Expédition et rejoint l'autre Expédition de son contrôleur.)
$<FLEETING>. All Characters #controlled.DE: $<FLEETING>.  Alle Charaktere, #die von einem Spieler deiner Wahl kontrolliert werden#, wechseln die Expeditionen. (Sie verlassen ihre Expeditionen und schließen sich der anderen Expedition des kontrollierenden Spielers an.)
$<FLEETING>. All Characters #controlled.ES: $<FLEETING>.  Todos los personajes #que controle un jugador objetivo# se trasladan de expedición. (Abandonan su expedición y se incorporan a la otra expedición de su controlador.)
$<FLEETING>. All Characters #controlled.IT: $<FLEETING>.  Tutti i personaggi #controllati da un giocatore bersaglio# cambiano spedizione. (Lasciano la loro spedizione e si uniscono all'altra spedizione del loro controllore.)

{J} Draw a card. At Dusk, if you contro.EN: {J} Draw a card.  At Dusk, if you control a <FLEETING> Character, another <ANCHORED> Character and yet another <ASLEEP> Character — You win the game.
{J} Draw a card. At Dusk, if you contro.FR: {J} Piochez une carte.  Au Crépuscule, si vous contrôlez un Personnage <FLEETING>, un autre Personnage <ANCHORED>, et encore un Personnage <ASLEEP> — vous gagnez la partie.
{J} Draw a card. At Dusk, if you contro.DE: {J} Ziehe eine Karte.  Falls du zum Abend einen Charakter mit <FLEETING>, einen weiteren Charakter mit <ANCHORED> und einen dritten Charakter mit <ASLEEP> kontrollierst — Du gewinnst das Spiel.
{J} Draw a card. At Dusk, if you contro.ES: {J} Roba una carta.  Al anochecer, si controlas un personaje con <FLEETING>, otro con <ANCHORED> y un tercero con <ASLEEP> — Ganas la partida.
{J} Draw a card. At Dusk, if you contro.IT: {J} Pesca una carta.  Al crepuscolo, se controlli un personaggio con <FLEETING>, un altro personaggio con <ANCHORED> e un terzo personaggio con <ASLEEP> — Vinci la partita.

When the time of the Kalann Mae comes, t.EN: When the time of the Kalann Mae comes, the Lyra all feel the call to a single place, where they will bring a masterpiece to life.
When the time of the Kalann Mae comes, t.FR: Quand vient le temps du Kalann Mae, les Lyra se sentent appelés vers un même lieu pour y faire naître un chef-d'œuvre.
When the time of the Kalann Mae comes, t.DE: Wenn die Zeit des Kalann Mae gekommen ist, fühlen sich die Lyra alle an einen Ort gerufen, an dem sie ein Meisterwerk zum Leben erwecken werden.
When the time of the Kalann Mae comes, t.ES: Cuando llega la hora del Kalann Mae, todos los de Lyra sienten la llamada a un lugar en el que podrán dar vida a una obra maestra.
When the time of the Kalann Mae comes, t.IT: Quando arriva il momento del Kalann Mae, tutti i Lyra sentono la chiamata per un unico luogo, dove daranno vita a un capolavoro.

#{J} Target Character gains <FLEETING>,.EN: #{J} Target Character gains <FLEETING>, <ANCHORED> or <ASLEEP>.#  At Dusk, if you control a <FLEETING> Character, another <ANCHORED> Character and yet another <ASLEEP> Character — You win the game.
#{J} Target Character gains <FLEETING>,.FR: #{J} Un Personnage ciblé gagne <FLEETING>, <ANCHORED> ou <ASLEEP>.#  Au Crépuscule, si vous contrôlez un Personnage <FLEETING>, un autre Personnage <ANCHORED>, et encore un Personnage <ASLEEP> — vous gagnez la partie.
#{J} Target Character gains <FLEETING>,.DE: #{J} Ein Charakter deiner Wahl erhält <FLEETING>, <ANCHORED> oder <ASLEEP>.#  Falls du zum Abend einen Charakter mit <FLEETING>, einen anderen Charakter mit <ANCHORED> und einen dritten Charakter mit <ASLEEP> kontrollierst — Du gewinnst das Spiel.
#{J} Target Character gains <FLEETING>,.ES: #{J} Un personaje objetivo gana <FLEETING>, <ANCHORED> o <ASLEEP>.#  Al anochecer, si controlas un personaje con <FLEETING>, otro con <ANCHORED> y un tercero con <ASLEEP> — Ganas la partida.
#{J} Target Character gains <FLEETING>,.IT: #{J} Un personaggio bersaglio ottiene <FLEETING>, <ANCHORED> o <ASLEEP>.#  Al crepuscolo, se controlli un personaggio con <FLEETING>, un altro personaggio con <ANCHORED> e un terzo personaggio con <ASLEEP> — Vinci la partita.

If you would roll one or more dice, inst.EN: If you would roll one or more dice, instead roll that many dice plus one and ignore the roll of your choice.
If you would roll one or more dice, inst.FR: Si vous deviez lancer un dé ou plus, lancez un dé supplémentaire et ignorez le résultat du dé de votre choix.
If you would roll one or more dice, inst.DE: Falls du einen oder mehrere Würfel werfen würdest, wirf zusätzlich einen mehr und ignoriere den Wurf deiner Wahl.
If you would roll one or more dice, inst.ES: Si fueses a tirar un dado o más, tira esa cantidad de dados más uno e ignora el dado que quieras.
If you would roll one or more dice, inst.IT: Se stai per lanciare uno o più dadi, lancia invece altrettanti dadi più uno e ignora un lancio a tua scelta.

The Expeditionary Corps' mobile outpost.EN: The Expeditionary Corps' mobile outpost soars high, like a spinning wheel weaving the wind.
The Expeditionary Corps' mobile outpost.FR: L'avant-poste mobile des Corps expéditionnaires s'élève haut, tel un rouet tissant le vent.
The Expeditionary Corps' mobile outpost.DE: Der mobile Außenposten des Expeditionstrupps schwebt hoch in den Lüften wie ein Spinnrad, das den Wind webt.
The Expeditionary Corps' mobile outpost.ES: El puesto móvil del cuerpo de exploración se alza en las alturas como la rueda de una rueca tejiendo el viento.
The Expeditionary Corps' mobile outpost.IT: L'avamposto mobile dei Corpi di spedizione svetta in alto, come un filatoio che tesse il vento.

#{J} <RESUPPLY>.# If you would #<RESUPP.EN: #{J} <RESUPPLY>.#  If you would #<RESUPPLY_INF>, instead reveal the top two cards of your deck. Put one in Reserve, and discard the other.#
#{J} <RESUPPLY>.# If you would #<RESUPP.FR: #{J} <RESUPPLY>.#  Si vous deviez #<RESUPPLY_INF>, à la place, révélez les deux premières cartes de votre deck. Mettez-en une en Réserve, et défaussez l'autre.#
#{J} <RESUPPLY>.# If you would #<RESUPP.DE: #{J} <RESUPPLY>.#  Falls du #<RESUPPLY_INF> spielen würdest, decke stattdessen die obersten zwei Karten deines Decks auf. Lege eine in die Reserve und die andere ab.#
#{J} <RESUPPLY>.# If you would #<RESUPP.ES: #{J} <RESUPPLY>.#  Si fueses a #<RESUPPLY_INF>, en vez de eso, revela las dos primeras cartas de tu mazo. Coloca una en la reserva y descarta la otra.#
#{J} <RESUPPLY>.# If you would #<RESUPP.IT: #{J} <RESUPPLY>.#  Se stai per #<RESUPPLY_INF>, rivela invece le prime due carte del tuo mazzo. Mettine una nella Riserva e scarta l'altra.#

The first Character you play each Aftern.EN: The first Character you play each Afternoon gains 1 boost$<BB>.
The first Character you play each Aftern.FR: Le premier Personnage que vous jouez chaque Après-midi gagne 1 boost$<BB>.
The first Character you play each Aftern.DE: Der erste Charakter, den du jeden Nachmittag spielst, erhält 1 Verstärkung$<BB>.
The first Character you play each Aftern.ES: El primer personaje que juegues cada tarde gana 1 potenciador.
The first Character you play each Aftern.IT: Il primo personaggio che giochi ogni pomeriggio ottiene 1 rinforzo$<BB>.

Nature must be nurtured to fully express.EN: Nature must be nurtured to fully express its generosity.
Nature must be nurtured to fully express.FR: La nature se doit d'être nourrie pour exprimer toute sa bienveillance.
Nature must be nurtured to fully express.DE: Die Natur muss gehegt und gepflegt werden, damit sie ihre Großzügigkeit voll entfalten kann.
Nature must be nurtured to fully express.ES: Si quieres conocer la auténtica generosidad de la naturaleza, cuídala.
Nature must be nurtured to fully express.IT: La natura deve essere nutrita per poter esprimere appieno la sua generosità.

{T}, Discard a card from your Reserve: t.EN: {T}, Discard a card from your Reserve: the next Character you play this turn with Hand Cost {3} or less gains <ANCHORED>. (During Rest, it doesn't go to Reserve and it loses Anchored.)
{T}, Discard a card from your Reserve: t.FR: {T}, Défaussez une carte de votre Réserve : le prochain Personnage de Coût de Main {3} ou moins que vous jouez ce tour gagne <ANCHORED>. (Au Repos, il ne va pas en Réserve et il perd Ancré.)
{T}, Discard a card from your Reserve: t.DE: {T} : Lege eine Karte aus deiner Reserve ab. Der nächste Charakter, den du in dieser Runde mit Handkosten {3} oder weniger spielst, erhält <ANCHORED>. (Während der Ruhepause geht er nicht in die Reserve und verliert Verankert.)
{T}, Discard a card from your Reserve: t.ES: {T}, descartar una carta de tu reserva: el siguiente personaje que juegues este turno con coste desde la mano de {3} o menos gana <ANCHORED>. (Durante el descanso, no va a la reserva y pierde anclaje.)
{T}, Discard a card from your Reserve: t.IT: {T}, scarta una carta dalla tua Riserva: il prossimo personaggio che giochi in questo turno con costo dalla mano pari o inferiore a {3} ottiene <ANCHORED>. (Durante il riposo, non va nella Riserva e perde Ancorato.)

When you care for the earth, it let root.EN: When you care for the earth, it let roots grow strong and resilient.
When you care for the earth, it let root.FR: C'est en aérant la terre que l'on permet aux racines de devenir fortes et endurantes.
When you care for the earth, it let root.DE: Wenn man die Erde pflegt, erwachsen aus ihr starke und widerstandsfähige Wurzeln.
When you care for the earth, it let root.ES: Si cuidas de la tierra, sus raíces se vuelven fuertes y resistentes.
When you care for the earth, it let root.IT: Quando ti prendi cura della terra, essa fa crescere radici forti e resistenti.

When one of your Expeditions moves forwa.EN: When one of your Expeditions moves forward due to {V} — Draw a card, then put a card from your hand in Reserve.
When one of your Expeditions moves forwa.FR: Lorsqu'une de vos Expéditions avance grâce à {V} — Piochez une carte, puis mettez une carte de votre main en Réserve.
When one of your Expeditions moves forwa.DE: Wenn sich eine deiner Expeditionen aufgrund von {V} vorwärts bewegt — Ziehe eine Karte und lege dann eine Karte aus deiner Hand in die Reserve.
When one of your Expeditions moves forwa.ES: Cuando una de tus expediciones avance debido a {V} — Roba una carta y luego coloca una carta de tu mano en la reserva.
When one of your Expeditions moves forwa.IT: Quando una delle tue spedizioni avanza per via di {V} — Pesca una carta, poi metti una carta dalla tua mano nella Riserva.

The forest always gives back, when you k.EN: The forest always gives back, when you know where to look.
The forest always gives back, when you k.FR: Si on donne à la forêt, alors elle saura se montrer généreuse en retour.
The forest always gives back, when you k.DE: Der Wald gibt immer etwas zurück. Man muss nur wissen, wo man suchen muss.
The forest always gives back, when you k.ES: Si sabes dónde buscar, el bosque siempre te devuelve lo que le ofreces.
The forest always gives back, when you k.IT: La foresta ti dà sempre qualcosa in cambio, se sai dove cercare.

\"We don’t inherit the earth from our an.EN: "We don’t inherit the earth from our ancestors, we borrow it from our children."
\"We don’t inherit the earth from our an.FR: "Nous n'héritons pas de la terre de nos ancêtres, nous l'empruntons à nos enfants."
\"We don’t inherit the earth from our an.DE: "Wir erben die Erde nicht von unseren Vorfahren, sondern leihen sie von unseren Kindern."
\"We don’t inherit the earth from our an.ES: «La Tierra no es herencia de nuestros padres, sino un préstamo de nuestros hijos».
\"We don’t inherit the earth from our an.IT: "Non ereditiamo la terra dai nostri antenati, la prendiamo in prestito dai nostri figli."

\"Want to play a game of headman-hunter-.EN: "Want to play a game of headman-hunter-fox with me? I promise not to cheat!"
\"Want to play a game of headman-hunter-.FR: "Tu sais jouer au renard qui passe ?"
\"Want to play a game of headman-hunter-.DE: "Willst du mit mir eine Partie Dorfvorsteher-Jäger-Fuchs spielen? Ich verspreche, ich werde nicht schummeln!"
\"Want to play a game of headman-hunter-.ES: «¿Queréis jugar al zorro? ¡Prometo que no haré trampas!».
\"Want to play a game of headman-hunter-.IT: "Vuoi giocare a capovillaggio, cacciatore e volpe con me? Ti prometto che non baro!"

{H} Each player #may <RESUPPLY_INF>.# (P.EN: {H} Each player #may <RESUPPLY_INF>.# (Put the top card of their deck in Reserve.)
{H} Each player #may <RESUPPLY_INF>.# (P.FR: {H} Chaque joueur #peut <RESUPPLY_INF>.# (Mettre la première carte de son deck en Réserve.)
{H} Each player #may <RESUPPLY_INF>.# (P.DE: {H} Alle Spieler #dürfen <RESUPPLY_INF> nutzen.# (Jeder legt die oberste Karte seines Decks in die Reserve.)
{H} Each player #may <RESUPPLY_INF>.# (P.ES: {H} Cada jugador #puede <RESUPPLY_INF>.# (Puede colocar la primera carta de su mazo en la reserva.)
{H} Each player #may <RESUPPLY_INF>.# (P.IT: {H} Ogni giocatore #può <RESUPPLY_INF>.# (Metti la prima carta del suo mazzo nella Riserva.)

Some say the harvesters are the caretake.EN: Some say the harvesters are the caretakers of the world-trees.
Some say the harvesters are the caretake.FR: Certains disent que les vendangeurs sont les jardiniers des arbres-mondes.
Some say the harvesters are the caretake.DE: Manche behaupten, die Spindelsammler seien die Hüter der Weltenbäume.
Some say the harvesters are the caretake.ES: Hay quienes dicen que los cosechadores son los cuidadores de los árboles del mundo.
Some say the harvesters are the caretake.IT: Qualcuno dice che i mietitori sono i custodi degli alberi del mondo.

{J} I gain $<ANCHORED>. #At Noon, if I.FR: {J} Je gagne $<ANCHORED>.  #À Midi, si j'ai au moins 2 boosts — $<RESUPPLY>.#
{J} I gain $<ANCHORED>. #At Noon, if I.DE: {J} Ich erhalte $<ANCHORED>.  #Zum Mittag, falls ich mindestens 2 Verstärkungen habe — $<RESUPPLY>.#
{J} I gain $<ANCHORED>. #At Noon, if I.ES: {J} Gano $<ANCHORED>.  #Al mediodía, si tengo 2 potenciadores o más — $<RESUPPLY>.#
{J} I gain $<ANCHORED>. #At Noon, if I.IT: {J} Ottengo $<ANCHORED>.  #A mezzogiorno, se ho 2 o più rinforzi — $<RESUPPLY>.#

#{D} : Target Character with Hand Cost {.EN: #{D} : Target Character with Hand Cost {3} or less gains <ANCHORED>.# (Discard me from Reserve to do this.)
#{D} : Target Character with Hand Cost {.FR: #{D} : Un Personnage ciblé de Coût de Main {3} ou moins gagne <ANCHORED>.# (Défaussez-moi de la Réserve pour ça.)
#{D} : Target Character with Hand Cost {.DE: #{D} : Ein Charakter deiner Wahl mit Handkosten {3} oder weniger erhält <ANCHORED>.# (Lege mich aus der Reserve ab, um diese Aktion auszuführen.)
#{D} : Target Character with Hand Cost {.ES: #{D}: Un personaje objetivo con coste desde la mano de {3} o menos gana <ANCHORED>.# (Descártame de la reserva para hacer esto.)

{J} I gain $<ANCHORED>. #At Noon — I ga.FR: {J} Je gagne $<ANCHORED>.  #À Midi — Je gagne 1 boost.#

There's no greater blessing for a tree t.EN: There's no greater blessing for a tree than to offer a home for a Kodama.
There's no greater blessing for a tree t.FR: Il n'y a pas de plus grande bénédiction pour un arbre que de devenir la maison d'un Kodama.
There's no greater blessing for a tree t.DE: Es gibt keinen größeren Segen für einen Baum, als einem Kodama ein Zuhause zu bieten.
There's no greater blessing for a tree t.ES: No hay mayor bendición para un árbol que convertirse en el hogar de un kodama.
There's no greater blessing for a tree t.IT: Non c'è benedizione più grande per un albero che offrire una casa a un kodama.

{J} If you control two or more Plants, I.EN: {J} If you control two or more Plants, I gain 2 boosts$<BB>. (Cards in Reserve are not controlled.)
{J} If you control two or more Plants, I.FR: {J} Si vous contrôlez au moins deux Plantes, je gagne 2 boosts$<BB>. (Les cartes en Réserve ne sont pas contrôlées.)
{J} If you control two or more Plants, I.DE: {J} Falls du mindestens zwei Pflanzen kontrollierst, erhalte ich 2 Verstärkungen$<BB>. (Karten in der Reserve werden nicht kontrolliert.)
{J} If you control two or more Plants, I.ES: {J} Si controlas dos plantas o más, gano 2 potenciadores. (Las cartas de la reserva no las controla nadie.)
{J} If you control two or more Plants, I.IT: {J} Se controlli due o più Piante, ottengo 2 rinforzi$<BB>. (Le carte nella Riserva non sono controllate.)

Green is good..FR: "Ça va aller. Je touche du bois."

{J} #If you have three or more base stat.EN: {J} #If you have three or more base statistics of 0 among Characters you control,# I gain 2 boosts.

{J} #If you have three or more base stat.DE: {J} #Falls du unter den Charakteren, die du kontrollierst, mindestens drei Basisstatistiken von 0 hast#, erhalte ich 2 Verstärkungen.

Harmony may bloom from a single act of k.EN: Harmony may bloom from a single act of kindness, as a rice field may sprout from a single grain of rice.

Harmony may bloom from a single act of k.ES: La armonía puede florecer del más pequeño acto de bondad, igual que un campo de arroz entero puede brotar de un solo grano.
Harmony may bloom from a single act of k.IT: L'armonia può sbocciare da un singolo atto di bontà, come un campo di riso può germogliare da un singolo chicco.

Yet beware of splinters of flax..EN: Yet beware of splinters of flax.
Yet beware of splinters of flax..FR: Prenez tout de même garde aux échardes de lin.
Yet beware of splinters of flax..DE: Doch hüte dich vor dem Stich der Spindel.
Yet beware of splinters of flax..ES: Pero ojo con las astillas de lino.
Yet beware of splinters of flax..IT: Fai attenzione alle lische di lino.

Target Character gains <ASLEEP>. #You ma.EN: Target Character gains <ASLEEP>. #You may give it 2 boosts.# (During Dusk, ignore its statistics. During Rest, it doesn't go to Reserve and it loses Asleep.)
Target Character gains <ASLEEP>. #You ma.FR: Un Personnage ciblé gagne <ASLEEP>. #Vous pouvez lui faire gagner 2 boosts.# (Au Crépuscule, ignorez ses statistiques. Au Repos, il ne va pas en Réserve et il perd Endormi.)
Target Character gains <ASLEEP>. #You ma.DE: Ein Charakter deiner Wahl erhält <ASLEEP>.  #Du darfst ihm 2 Verstärkungen geben#. (Am Abend ignoriere seine Statistiken. Während der Ruhepause geht er nicht in die Reserve und verliert Schlafend.)
Target Character gains <ASLEEP>. #You ma.ES: Un personaje objetivo gana <ASLEEP>. #Puedes darle 2 potenciadores.# (Durante el anochecer, ignora sus estadísticas. Durante el descanso, no va a la reserva y pierde sueño.)
Target Character gains <ASLEEP>. #You ma.IT: Un personaggio bersaglio ottiene <ASLEEP>. #Puoi conferirgli 2 rinforzi.# (Durante il crepuscolo, ignora le sue statistiche. Durante il riposo, non va nella Riserva e perde Dormiente.)

The thankful receiver bears a plentiful.EN: The thankful receiver bears a plentiful harvest.
The thankful receiver bears a plentiful.FR: Qui parle sème, qui écoute récolte.
The thankful receiver bears a plentiful.DE: Der dankbare Empfänger bringt eine reiche Ernte hervor.
The thankful receiver bears a plentiful.ES: Quien recibe agradecido da copiosas cosechas.
The thankful receiver bears a plentiful.IT: Chi è riconoscente di ciò che riceve porta con sé un abbondante raccolto.

Within the Spindle's trunk is the Bark R.EN: Within the Spindle's trunk is the Bark Refuge, the sanctuary where the Muna converse with sentient plants.
Within the Spindle's trunk is the Bark R.FR: Le Fuseau abrite en son tronc le Refuge de l'Écorce, le sanctuaire où les Muna conversent avec les plantes sentientes.
Within the Spindle's trunk is the Bark R.DE: Im Stamm der Spindel befindet sich das Rinden-Refugium – das Heiligtum, in dem die Muna mit empfindungsfähigen Pflanzen kommunizieren.
Within the Spindle's trunk is the Bark R.ES: Dentro del tronco del Balaustre se encuentra el Refugio de la corteza, un santuario en el que los de Muna charlan con plantas inteligentes.
Within the Spindle's trunk is the Bark R.IT: All'interno del tronco del Fuso si trova il Riparo della Corteccia, il santuario in cui i Muna dialogano con le piante senzienti.

I can't be played but I can be used as a.EN: I can't be played but I can be used as a Mana Orb. (In draft, you may add any number of 'Mana Convergence' cards to your deck.)
I can't be played but I can be used as a.FR: Je ne peux pas être joué, seulement utilisé en tant qu'Orbe de Mana. (En draft, ajoutez autant d'Afflux de Mana que souhaité à votre deck.)
I can't be played but I can be used as a.DE: Ich bin nicht spielbar, aber fungiere als Manakugel. (Beim Ziehen darfst du dein Deck um eine beliebige Anzahl von "Mana-Konvergenz"-Karten ergänzen.)
I can't be played but I can be used as a.ES: No se me puede jugar, pero se me puede usar como orbe de maná. (En un draft, puedes añadir cualquier número de cartas «Convergencia de maná» a tu mazo.)
I can't be played but I can be used as a.IT: Non puoi giocarmi, ma puoi usarmi come una sfera di mana. (In Draft, puoi aggiungere al tuo mazzo un qualsiasi numero di carte "Convergenza di Mana".)

At Noon — Create an <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Sold.EN: At Noon — Create an <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Soldier token in your Hero Expedition.
At Noon — Create an <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Sold.FR: À Midi — Créez un jeton Soldat <ORDIS_RECRUIT> dans votre Expédition Héros.
At Noon — Create an <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Sold.DE: Zum Mittag — Erschaffe eine <ORDIS_RECRUIT>-Soldatenmarke in deiner Helden-Expedition.
At Noon — Create an <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Sold.ES: Al mediodía — Crea una ficha de soldado <ORDIS_RECRUIT> en tu expedición del héroe.
At Noon — Create an <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Sold.IT: A mezzogiorno — Crea una pedina Soldato <ORDIS_RECRUIT> nella tua spedizione dell'eroe.

Follow me, friends! If we stand together.EN: Follow me, friends! If we stand together, nothing can stop us!
Follow me, friends! If we stand together.FR: Suivez-moi, compagnons ! Si nous travaillons de concert, rien ne pourra nous arrêter !
Follow me, friends! If we stand together.DE: Folgt mir, Freunde! Wenn wir zusammenstehen, kann uns nichts aufhalten!
Follow me, friends! If we stand together.IT: Seguitemi, amici! Se rimaniamo uniti, nulla può fermarci!

At Noon, if you control one or more Bure.EN: At Noon, if you control one or more Bureaucrats — Create an <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Soldier token in target Expedition.  When you play a Bureaucrat — You may have it gain <ASLEEP>. (During Dusk, ignore its statistics. During Rest, it doesn't go to Reserve and it loses Asleep.)
At Noon, if you control one or more Bure.FR: À Midi, si vous contrôlez au moins un Bureaucrate — Créez un jeton Soldat <ORDIS_RECRUIT> dans l'Expédition ciblée.  Lorsque vous jouez un Bureaucrate — Vous pouvez lui faire gagner <ASLEEP>. (Au Crépuscule, ignorez ses statistiques. Au Repos, il ne va pas en Réserve et il perd Endormi.)
At Noon, if you control one or more Bure.DE: Zum Mittag, falls du mindestens einen Bürokraten kontrollierst — Erschaffe eine <ORDIS_RECRUIT>-Soldatenmarke in einer Expedition deiner Wahl.  Wenn du einen Bürokraten spielst — Du darfst ihn <ASLEEP> erhalten lassen. (Am Abend ignoriere seine Statistiken. Während der Ruhepause geht er nicht in die Reserve und verliert Schlafend.)
At Noon, if you control one or more Bure.ES: Al mediodía, si controlas un burócrata o más — Crea una ficha de soldado <ORDIS_RECRUIT> en una expedición objetivo.  Cuando juegues un burócrata — Puedes hacer que gane <ASLEEP>. (Durante el anochecer, ignora sus estadísticas. Durante el descanso, no va a la reserva y pierde sueño).
At Noon, if you control one or more Bure.IT: A mezzogiorno, se controlli uno o più Burocrati — Crea una pedina Soldato <ORDIS_RECRUIT> in una spedizione bersaglio.  Quando giochi un Burocrate — Puoi fargli ottenere <ASLEEP>. (Durante il crepuscolo, ignora le sue statistiche. Durante il riposo, non va nella Riserva e perde Dormiente.)

Bureaucracy is an art that requires care.EN: Bureaucracy is an art that requires careful planning.
Bureaucracy is an art that requires care.FR: La bureaucratie est un art qui exige une grande planification.
Bureaucracy is an art that requires care.DE: Bürokratie ist eine Kunst, die sorgfältige Planung erfordert.
Bureaucracy is an art that requires care.ES: La burocracia es un arte que requiere una meticulosa planificación.
Bureaucracy is an art that requires care.IT: La burocrazia è un'arte che richiede un'attenta pianificazione.

When you create a token — It gains 1 boo.EN: When you create a token — It gains 1 boost.  If you have less than eight Mana Orbs, <BOOSTED_TKN_P> tokens you control have <DEFENDER>. (Their Expeditions can't advance during Dusk.)
When you create a token — It gains 1 boo.FR: Lorsque vous créez un jeton — Il gagne 1 boost.  Si vous avez moins de huit Orbes de Mana, les jetons <BOOSTED_TKN_P> que vous contrôlez ont <DEFENDER>. (Leurs Expéditions ne peuvent pas avancer au Crépuscule.)
When you create a token — It gains 1 boo.DE: Wenn du eine Marke erstellst — Sie erhält 1 Verstärkung.  Falls du weniger als acht Manakugeln hast, erhalten <BOOSTED_TKN_P>-Marken, die du kontrollierst, $<DEFENDER>. (Am Abend können ihre Expeditionen nicht vorrücken.)
When you create a token — It gains 1 boo.ES: Cuando crees una ficha — Esta gana 1 potenciador.  Si tienes menos de ocho orbes de maná, las fichas <BOOSTED_TKN_P> que controles tienen <DEFENDER>. (Sus expediciones no pueden avanzar durante el anochecer.)
When you create a token — It gains 1 boo.IT: Quando crei una pedina — Ottiene 1 rinforzo.  Se hai meno di otto sfere di mana, le pedine con <BOOSTED_TKN_P> che controlli hanno <DEFENDER>. (Le loro spedizioni non possono avanzare durante il crepuscolo.)

The Ordis way lies in patience and resil.EN: The Ordis way lies in patience and resilience.
The Ordis way lies in patience and resil.FR: L'idéal de l'Ordis repose sur la patience et l'endurance.
The Ordis way lies in patience and resil.DE: Der Weg der Ordis ist geprägt von Geduld und Widerstandskraft.
The Ordis way lies in patience and resil.ES: La senda de Ordis es la paciencia y la resistencia.
The Ordis way lies in patience and resil.IT: Gli Ordis seguono la via della pazienza e della resilienza.

{D} : Create an <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Soldier.EN: {D} : Create an <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Soldier token in target Expedition. (Discard me from Reserve to do this.)
{D} : Create an <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Soldier.FR: {D} : Créez un jeton Soldat <ORDIS_RECRUIT> dans l'Expédition ciblée. (Défaussez-moi de la Réserve pour ça.)

{D} : Create an <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Soldier.ES: {D}: Crea una ficha de soldado <ORDIS_RECRUIT> en una expedición objetivo. (Descártame de la reserva para hacer esto.)
{D} : Create an <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Soldier.IT: {D}: crea una pedina Soldato <ORDIS_RECRUIT> in una spedizione bersaglio. (Scartami dalla Riserva per giocare questa azione.)

Words mean more than what is set down on.EN: Words mean more than what is set down on paper.
Words mean more than what is set down on.FR: Les paroles s'envolent, les écrits aussi.
Words mean more than what is set down on.DE: Worte bedeuten mehr als das, was auf dem Papier steht.
Words mean more than what is set down on.ES: Las palabras dicen mucho más que lo que ves escrito en el papel.
Words mean more than what is set down on.IT: Le parole significano più di quanto è scritto sulla carta.

\"Chin up and stand tall. You’re shieldb.EN: "Chin up and stand tall. You’re shieldbearers of the Aegis now!"
\"Chin up and stand tall. You’re shieldb.FR: "Relevez la tête, tenez vous fièrement. Vous êtes maintenant boucliers de l'Aegis !"
\"Chin up and stand tall. You’re shieldb.DE: "Kopf hoch und Haltung annehmen. Ihr seid jetzt Schildträger der Aegis!"
\"Chin up and stand tall. You’re shieldb.ES: «Animad esas caras, las cabezas bien altas. ¡Ahora sois escuderos de la Égida!».
\"Chin up and stand tall. You’re shieldb.IT: "Su col morale e testa alta! Ora siete gli scudieri dell'Aegis!"

Thankfully, he doesn't seal his contract.EN: Thankfully, he doesn't seal his contracts with a kiss.

\"The form has been filled out incorrect.EN: "The form has been filled out incorrectly. Please make a new appointment tomorrow."
\"The form has been filled out incorrect.FR: "Le formulaire a été mal rempli. Veuillez prendre un nouveau rendez-vous demain."
\"The form has been filled out incorrect.DE: "Dieses Formular wurde nicht korrekt ausgefüllt. Bitte vereinbaren Sie für morgen einen neuen Termin."
\"The form has been filled out incorrect.ES: «Este formulario no está cumplimentado correctamente. Por favor, pide cita para mañana».
\"The form has been filled out incorrect.IT: "Il modulo è stato compilato in modo errato. Si prega di fissare un nuovo appuntamento domani."

{J} If you control three or more other C.FR: {J} Si vous contrôlez au moins trois autres Personnages, piochez une carte. (Les cartes en Réserve ne sont pas contrôlées.)
{J} If you control three or more other C.DE: {J} Falls du mindestens drei andere Charaktere kontrollierst, ziehe eine Karte. (Karten in der Reserve werden nicht kontrolliert.)
{J} If you control three or more other C.ES: {J} Si controlas otros tres personajes o más, roba una carta. (Las cartas de la reserva no las controla nadie.)
{J} If you control three or more other C.IT: {J} Se controlli altri tre o più personaggi, pesca una carta. (Le carte nella Riserva non sono controllate.)

\"Never give up. No one knows what’s goi.EN: "Never give up. No one knows what’s going to happen next."
\"Never give up. No one knows what’s goi.FR: "N'abandonne jamais. Personne ne sait de quoi demain sera fait."
\"Never give up. No one knows what’s goi.DE: "Gib nicht auf. Niemand weiß, was als Nächstes geschehen wird."
\"Never give up. No one knows what’s goi.ES: «No te rindas nunca. Nadie sabe lo que te deparará el mañana».
\"Never give up. No one knows what’s goi.IT: "Non arrenderti mai. Nessuno sa cosa sta per succedere."

{J} If you control #two or more other <B.ES: {J} Si controlas #otros dos personajes <BOOSTED_CHA_P> o más#, roba una carta.
{J} If you control #two or more other <B.IT: {J} Se controlli #altri due o più personaggi con <BOOSTED_CHA_P>#, pesca una carta.

The {j}, {h} and {r} triggers of Charact.EN: The {j}, {h} and {r} triggers of Characters facing me don't activate.
The {j}, {h} and {r} triggers of Charact.FR: Les déclencheurs {j}, {h} et {r} des Personnages qui me font face ne s'activent pas.
The {j}, {h} and {r} triggers of Charact.DE: Die Auslöser {j}, {h} und {r} der mir gegenüberstehenden Charaktere werden nicht aktiviert.
The {j}, {h} and {r} triggers of Charact.ES: Los efectos disparados {j}, {h} y {r} de los personajes enfrentados a mí no se activan.
The {j}, {h} and {r} triggers of Charact.IT: Gli inneschi {j}, {h} e {r} dei personaggi che mi affrontano non si attivano.

The idea of facing the Council is deterr.EN: The idea of facing the Council is deterrent enough for most would-be criminals in Asgartha.
The idea of facing the Council is deterr.FR: La simple idée de faire face au Conseil suffit à dissuader la plupart des criminels d'Asgartha.
The idea of facing the Council is deterr.DE: Der Gedanke, dem Rat gegenüberzustehen, ist für die meisten Möchtegern-Verbrecher in Asgartha abschreckend genug.
The idea of facing the Council is deterr.ES: La mera idea de tener que vérselas con el Concilio basta para disuadir a la mayoría de los criminales de Asgartha.
The idea of facing the Council is deterr.IT: Già solo l'idea di comparire innanzi al Concilio funge da deterrente per i potenziali criminali di Asgartha.

Choose one: • Send to Reserve target Ch.IT: Scegli uno:  • Manda un personaggio bersaglio con costo dalla mano pari o superiore a {4} nella Riserva.  • Scarta un permanente bersaglio con costo dalla mano pari o superiore a {4}.

Create two <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Soldier token.EN: Create two <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Soldier tokens in each of your Expeditions.
Create two <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Soldier token.FR: Créez deux jetons Soldat <ORDIS_RECRUIT> dans chacune de vos Expéditions.
Create two <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Soldier token.DE: Erschaffe zwei <ORDIS_RECRUIT>-Soldatenmarken in jeder deiner Expeditionen.
Create two <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Soldier token.ES: Crea dos fichas de soldado <ORDIS_RECRUIT> en cada una de tus expediciones.
Create two <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Soldier token.IT: Crea due pedine Soldato <ORDIS_RECRUIT> in ciascuna delle tue spedizioni.

For the first time in centuries, the Sol.EN: For the first time in centuries, the Solstice Gate has opened. For the first time in ages, humanity will discover what lies beyond the gates.
For the first time in centuries, the Sol.FR: La Porte du Solstice est ouverte. Pour la première fois depuis des temps immémoriaux, l'humanité va découvrir ce qui se trouve au-delà des portes.
For the first time in centuries, the Sol.DE: Zum ersten Mal seit Jahrhunderten hat sich das Tor der Sonnenwende geöffnet. Zum ersten Mal seit Jahrhunderten wird die Menschheit entdecken, was hinter diesem Tor liegt.
For the first time in centuries, the Sol.ES: Por primera vez en siglos, el Portal del solsticio se ha abierto. Por primera vez en eras, la humanidad descubrirá lo que hay más allá de las puertas.
For the first time in centuries, the Sol.IT: Per la prima volta dopo secoli, il Portale del Solstizio è stato aperto. Per la prima volta dopo anni, l'umanità scoprirà cosa si nasconde al di là dei cancelli.

Create #four# <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Soldier to.EN: Create #four# <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Soldier tokens, #distributed as you choose among any number of target Expeditions#.
Create #four# <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Soldier to.FR: Créez #quatre# jetons Soldat <ORDIS_RECRUIT>, #distribués comme vous le souhaitez dans n'importe quel nombre d'Expéditions ciblées#.
Create #four# <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Soldier to.DE: Erschaffe #vier# <ORDIS_RECRUIT>-Soldatenmarken und #verteile sie nach Belieben auf Expeditionen deiner Wahl.#
Create #four# <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Soldier to.ES: Crea #cuatro# fichas de soldado <ORDIS_RECRUIT>, #distribuidas como elijas entre cualquier número de expediciones objetivo#.
Create #four# <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Soldier to.IT: Crea #quattro# pedine Soldato <ORDIS_RECRUIT> #distribuite a tua scelta tra un numero qualsiasi di spedizioni bersaglio#.

Create #a <BRASSBUG> Robot# token in eac.EN: Create #a <BRASSBUG> Robot# token in each of your Expeditions.
Create #a <BRASSBUG> Robot# token in eac.FR: Créez #un jeton Robot <BRASSBUG># dans chacune de vos Expéditions.
Create #a <BRASSBUG> Robot# token in eac.ES: Crea #una ficha de robot <BRASSBUG># en cada una de tus expediciones.
Create #a <BRASSBUG> Robot# token in eac.IT: Crea #una pedina Robot <BRASSBUG># in ciascuna delle tue spedizioni.

$<FLEETING>. Target Expedition can't mo.EN: $<FLEETING>.  Target Expedition can't move forward this Day.
$<FLEETING>. Target Expedition can't mo.FR: $<FLEETING>.  L'Expédition ciblée ne peut pas avancer ce Jour.
$<FLEETING>. Target Expedition can't mo.DE: $<FLEETING>.  Eine Expedition deiner Wahl kann sich an diesem Tag nicht vorwärts bewegen.
$<FLEETING>. Target Expedition can't mo.ES: $<FLEETING>.  Una expedición objetivo no puede avanzar este día.
$<FLEETING>. Target Expedition can't mo.IT: $<FLEETING>.  Una spedizione bersaglio non può avanzare in questa giornata.

Today, and for centuries to come, we wil.EN: Today, and for centuries to come, we will celebrate victory over the Kraken and revel in freedom regained!
Today, and for centuries to come, we wil.FR: "Aujourd'hui, et pour les siècles à venir, nous célébrerons la victoire sur le Kraken et notre liberté retrouvée !"
Today, and for centuries to come, we wil.DE: Heute und in aller Zukunft werden wir den Sieg über den Kraken feiern und uns an der wiedergewonnenen Freiheit erfreuen!
Today, and for centuries to come, we wil.ES: ¡Hoy, y en los siglos venideros, celebraremos la victoria contra el Kraken y disfrutaremos de la libertad que hemos reconquistado!
Today, and for centuries to come, we wil.IT: Oggi e per i secoli a venire, festeggeremo la vittoria sul Kraken e ci godremo la libertà riconquistata!

$<FLEETING>. #Expeditions# can't move f.FR: $<FLEETING>.  #Les Expéditions# ne peuvent pas avancer ce Jour.
$<FLEETING>. #Expeditions# can't move f.DE: $<FLEETING>.  #Expeditionen# können sich an diesem Tag nicht vorwärts bewegen.
$<FLEETING>. #Expeditions# can't move f.ES: $<FLEETING>.  #Las expediciones# no pueden avanzar este día.
$<FLEETING>. #Expeditions# can't move f.IT: $<FLEETING>.  #Le spedizioni# non possono avanzare in questa giornata.

When a Character joins your Expeditions.EN: When a Character joins your Expeditions — It gains 1 boost$<BB>.
When a Character joins your Expeditions.FR: Lorsqu'un Personnage rejoint vos Expéditions — Il gagne 1 boost$<BB>.
When a Character joins your Expeditions.DE: Wenn ein Charakter sich einer deiner Expeditionen anschließt — Er erhält 1 Verstärkung$<BB>.
When a Character joins your Expeditions.ES: Cuando un personaje se incorpore a una de tus expediciones — Este gana 1 potenciador.
When a Character joins your Expeditions.IT: Quando un personaggio si unisce alle tue spedizioni — Ottiene 1 rinforzo$<BB>.

A beacon of knowledge and order, a light.EN: A beacon of knowledge and order, a lighthouse towering high above the world.
A beacon of knowledge and order, a light.FR: Un flambeau de connaissance et de civilisation. Un phare qui surplombe le monde.
A beacon of knowledge and order, a light.DE: Ein Wahrzeichen des Wissens und der Ordnung, ein Leuchtturm, der hoch über der Welt thront.
A beacon of knowledge and order, a light.ES: Una luminaria de saber y orden, un faro que se alza sobre el mundo.
A beacon of knowledge and order, a light.IT: Un lume di conoscenza e ordine, un faro che svetta sul mondo.

When a #non-token# Character joins your.EN: When a #non-token# Character joins your Expeditions — It gains 1 boost.
When a #non-token# Character joins your.FR: Lorsqu'un Personnage #non-jeton# rejoint vos Expéditions — Il gagne 1 boost.
When a #non-token# Character joins your.DE: Wenn ein #Nicht-Marken#-Charakter sich einer deiner Expeditionen anschließt — Er erhält 1 Verstärkung.
When a #non-token# Character joins your.ES: Cuando un personaje #que no sea ficha# se incorpore a una de tus expediciones — Este gana 1 potenciador.
When a #non-token# Character joins your.IT: Quando un personaggio #non pedina# si unisce alle tue spedizioni — Ottiene 1 rinforzo.

At Noon — Target Expedition moves forwar.EN: At Noon — Target Expedition moves forward one region.
At Noon — Target Expedition moves forwar.FR: À Midi — L'Expédition ciblée avance d'une région.
At Noon — Target Expedition moves forwar.DE: Zum Mittag — Eine Expedition deiner Wahl bewegt sich eine Region vorwärts.
At Noon — Target Expedition moves forwar.ES: Al mediodía — Una expedición objetivo avanza una región.
At Noon — Target Expedition moves forwar.IT: A mezzogiorno — Una spedizione bersaglio avanza di una regione.

The Ordis built a relay of lighthouses t.EN: The Ordis built a relay of lighthouses to light the way through the Tumult.
The Ordis built a relay of lighthouses t.FR: Les Ordis ont construit un relais de phares pour éclairer le chemin dans le Tumulte.
The Ordis built a relay of lighthouses t.DE: Die Ordis bauten eine Reihe von Leuchttürmen, um den Weg durch den Tumult zu weisen.
The Ordis built a relay of lighthouses t.ES: Ordis fabricó una red de faros para iluminar el camino que atraviesa el Tumulto.
The Ordis built a relay of lighthouses t.IT: Gli Ordis hanno costruito una serie di fari per illuminare la via attraverso il Tumulto.

#$<TOUGH_2>.# At Noon — Target Expediti.EN: #$<TOUGH_2>.#  At Noon — Target Expedition moves forward one region.
#$<TOUGH_2>.# At Noon — Target Expediti.FR: #$<TOUGH_2>.#  À Midi — L'Expédition ciblée avance d'une région.
#$<TOUGH_2>.# At Noon — Target Expediti.DE: #$<TOUGH_2>.#  Zum Mittag — Eine Expedition deiner Wahl bewegt sich eine Region vorwärts.
#$<TOUGH_2>.# At Noon — Target Expediti.ES: #$<TOUGH_2>.#  Al mediodía — Una expedición objetivo avanza una región.
#$<TOUGH_2>.# At Noon — Target Expediti.IT: #$<TOUGH_2>.#  A mezzogiorno — Una spedizione bersaglio avanza di una regione.

At Noon — Create an <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Sold.EN: At Noon — Create an <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Soldier token in your Companion Expedition.
At Noon — Create an <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Sold.FR: À Midi — Créez un jeton Soldat <ORDIS_RECRUIT> dans votre Expédition Compagnon.
At Noon — Create an <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Sold.DE: Zum Mittag — Erschaffe eine <ORDIS_RECRUIT>-Soldatenmarke in deiner Gefährten-Expedition.
At Noon — Create an <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Sold.ES: Al mediodía — Crea una ficha de soldado <ORDIS_RECRUIT> en tu expedición del compañero.
At Noon — Create an <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Sold.IT: A mezzogiorno — Crea una pedina Soldato <ORDIS_RECRUIT> nella spedizione del tuo compagno.

The flow of Ordis Recruits seems to go o.EN: The flow of Ordis Recruits seems to go on forever.
The flow of Ordis Recruits seems to go o.FR: Le flot des recrues Ordis ne semble pas vouloir se tarir.
The flow of Ordis Recruits seems to go o.DE: Der Strom an Ordis-Rekruten scheint nicht abzureißen.
The flow of Ordis Recruits seems to go o.ES: Parece que el río de reclutas Ordis es inagotable.
The flow of Ordis Recruits seems to go o.IT: La processione di reclute Ordis sembra non finire mai.

At Noon — Create an <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Sold.EN: At Noon — Create an <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Soldier token in #each of your Expeditions#.
At Noon — Create an <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Sold.FR: À Midi — Créez un jeton Soldat <ORDIS_RECRUIT> dans #chacune de vos Expéditions#.
At Noon — Create an <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Sold.DE: Zum Mittag — Erschaffe eine <ORDIS_RECRUIT>-Soldatenmarke in #jeder deiner Expeditionen#.
At Noon — Create an <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Sold.ES: Al mediodía — Crea una ficha de soldado <ORDIS_RECRUIT> en #cada una de tus expediciones#.
At Noon — Create an <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Sold.IT: A mezzogiorno — Crea una pedina Soldato <ORDIS_RECRUIT> in #ciascuna delle tue spedizioni#.

Recruits are the backbone of the Ordis m.EN: Recruits are the backbone of the Ordis military.
Recruits are the backbone of the Ordis m.FR: Les recrues sont la charpente des forces Ordis.
Recruits are the backbone of the Ordis m.DE: Rekruten bilden das Rückgrat des Ordis-Militärs.
Recruits are the backbone of the Ordis m.ES: Los reclutas son el pilar del ejército de Ordis.
Recruits are the backbone of the Ordis m.IT: Le reclute sono la colonna portante dell'esercito degli Ordis.

{T} : $<AFTER_YOU>. You can only activat.EN: {T} : $<AFTER_YOU>. You can only activate this if you are the first player.
{T} : $<AFTER_YOU>. You can only activat.FR: {T} : $<AFTER_YOU>. Vous pouvez seulement activer cela si vous êtes le premier joueur.
{T} : $<AFTER_YOU>. You can only activat.DE: {T} : $<AFTER_YOU>. Du kannst dies nur aktivieren, falls du der erste Spieler bist.
{T} : $<AFTER_YOU>. You can only activat.ES: {T}: $<AFTER_YOU>. Solo puedes activar esto si eres el primer jugador.
{T} : $<AFTER_YOU>. You can only activat.IT: {T}: $<AFTER_YOU>. Puoi attivare questa azione solo se sei il primo giocatore.

Whatever ordeals we may face, good manne.EN: Whatever ordeals we may face, good manners and politeness are always in fashion!
Whatever ordeals we may face, good manne.FR: Les bonnes manières et la politesse ne sont jamais hors de propos, quelle que soit la situation.
Whatever ordeals we may face, good manne.DE: Was auch immer uns bevorstehen mag: Gute Manieren und Höflichkeit kommen nie aus der Mode!
Whatever ordeals we may face, good manne.ES: Por grandes que sean las tribulaciones, nunca debemos olvidar las buenas costumbres y la educación.
Whatever ordeals we may face, good manne.IT: Qualunque sia la prova che dobbiamo affrontare, le buone maniere e l'educazione sono sempre di moda!

{T} : Create a <MAW> Companion token in.EN: {T} : Create a <MAW> Companion token in your Companion Expedition with "When you sacrifice a Character — I gain 2 boosts". This action costs {1} more if you are not the first player.
{T} : Create a <MAW> Companion token in.FR: {T} : Créez un jeton Compagnon <MAW> dans votre Expédition Compagnon avec « Lorsque vous sacrifiez un Personnage — Je gagne 2 boosts ». Cette action coûte {1} de plus si vous n'êtes pas le premier joueur.
{T} : Create a <MAW> Companion token in.DE: {T} : Erschaffe eine <MAW>-Gefährtenmarke in deiner Gefährten-Expedition mit "Wenn du einen Charakter opferst — Ich erhalte 2 Verstärkungen". Diese Aktion kostet {1} mehr, falls du nicht der erste Spieler bist.
{T} : Create a <MAW> Companion token in.ES: {T}: Crea una ficha de compañero <MAW> en tu expedición del compañero con "cuando sacrifiques un personaje — Gano 2 potenciadores". Esta acción cuesta {1} más si no eres el primer jugador.
{T} : Create a <MAW> Companion token in.IT: {T}: crea una pedina Compagno <MAW> nella spedizione del tuo compagno con "Quando sacrifichi un personaggio — Ottengo 2 rinforzi". Questa azione costa {1} in più se non sei il primo giocatore.

To master magic, one must be willing to.EN: To master magic, one must be willing to sacrifice.
To master magic, one must be willing to.FR: Maîtriser la magie requiert de nombreux sacrifices.
To master magic, one must be willing to.DE: Wer Magie beherrschen will, muss bereit sein, Opfer zu bringen.
To master magic, one must be willing to.ES: Para dominar la magia, hay que estar dispuesto a realizar grandes sacrificios.
To master magic, one must be willing to.IT: Per dominare la magia, bisogna essere disposti al sacrificio.

When you play a Spell — Target Character.EN: When you play a Spell — Target Character you control gains 1 boost$<BB>. (Do this after the spell resolves.)
When you play a Spell — Target Character.FR: Lorsque vous jouez un Sort — Un Personnage ciblé que vous contrôlez gagne 1 boost$<BB>. (Faites cela après que le sort est résolu.)
When you play a Spell — Target Character.DE: Wenn du einen Zauber spielst — Ein Charakter deiner Wahl, den du kontrollierst, erhält 1 Verstärkung$<BB>. (Dies geschieht, wenn der Effekt abgeklungen ist.)
When you play a Spell — Target Character.ES: Cuando juegues un hechizo — Un personaje objetivo que controles gana 1 potenciador. (Haz esto después de que el hechizo se resuelva.)
When you play a Spell — Target Character.IT: Quando giochi una magia — Un personaggio bersaglio che controlli ottiene 1 rinforzo$<BB>. (Fallo dopo che la magia si risolve.)

The world feeds on magic, and withers in.EN: The world feeds on magic, and withers in its absence.
The world feeds on magic, and withers in.FR: Le monde se nourrit de magie, et s'étiole en son absence.
The world feeds on magic, and withers in.DE: Die Welt lebt von der Magie – und verkümmert in ihrer Abwesenheit.
The world feeds on magic, and withers in.ES: El mundo se nutre de magia y se marchita en su ausencia.
The world feeds on magic, and withers in.IT: Il mondo si nutre di magia e si inaridisce in sua assenza.

{D} : The next Spell you play this turn.EN: {D} : The next Spell you play this turn costs {1} less. (Discard me from Reserve to do this.)
{D} : The next Spell you play this turn.FR: {D} : Le prochain Sort que vous jouez ce tour coûte {1} de moins. (Défaussez-moi de la Réserve pour ça.)
{D} : The next Spell you play this turn.DE: {D} : Der nächste Zauber, den du in dieser Runde spielst, kostet {1} weniger. (Lege mich aus der Reserve ab, um diese Aktion auszuführen.)
{D} : The next Spell you play this turn.ES: {D}: El siguiente hechizo que juegues este turno cuesta {1} menos. (Descártame de la reserva para hacer esto.)
{D} : The next Spell you play this turn.IT: {D}: la prossima magia che giochi in questo turno costa {1} in meno. (Scartami dalla Riserva per giocare questa azione.)

So far behind, and still so much to lear.EN: So far behind, and still so much to learn!
So far behind, and still so much to lear.FR: En retard, et encore tant de choses à apprendre !
So far behind, and still so much to lear.DE: So weit zurück, und noch so viel zu lernen!
So far behind, and still so much to lear.ES: ¡Lo que me queda por aprender y lo atrasado que voy!
So far behind, and still so much to lear.IT: Così indietro e con così tanto ancora da imparare!

#{R} The next Spell you play this Aftern.EN: #{R} The next Spell you play this Afternoon costs {1} less.#
#{R} The next Spell you play this Aftern.FR: #{R} Le prochain Sort que vous jouez cet Après-midi coûte {1} de moins.#
#{R} The next Spell you play this Aftern.DE: #{R} Der nächste Zauber, den du heute Nachmittag spielst, kostet {1} weniger.#
#{R} The next Spell you play this Aftern.ES: #{R} El siguiente hechizo que juegues esta tarde cuesta {1} menos.#
#{R} The next Spell you play this Aftern.IT: #{R} La prossima magia che giochi questo pomeriggio costa {1} in meno.#

When I'm sacrificed, if I'm not <FLEETIN.EN: When I'm sacrificed, if I'm not <FLEETING> — Put me in Reserve.
When I'm sacrificed, if I'm not <FLEETIN.FR: Lorsque je suis sacrifiée, si je ne suis pas <FLEETING> — Mettez-moi en Réserve.
When I'm sacrificed, if I'm not <FLEETIN.DE: Wenn ich geopfert werde und falls ich dabei nicht <FLEETING> bin — Lege mich in die Reserve.
When I'm sacrificed, if I'm not <FLEETIN.ES: Cuando me sacrifiques, si no tengo <FLEETING> — Colócame en la reserva.
When I'm sacrificed, if I'm not <FLEETIN.IT: Quando mi sacrifichi, se non ho <FLEETING> — Mettimi nella Riserva.

Theoretically, transdifferentiation can.EN: Theoretically, transdifferentiation can go on indefinitely, effectively rendering the jellyfish biologically immortal... and squishy.
Theoretically, transdifferentiation can.FR: En théorie, la transdifférenciation peut se poursuivre indéfiniment, rendant ainsi la méduse biologiquement immortelle... et visqueuse.
Theoretically, transdifferentiation can.DE: Theoretisch kann die Transdifferenzierung unbegrenzt fortgesetzt werden, sodass die Qualle biologisch unsterblich wird … und matschig.
Theoretically, transdifferentiation can.ES: En teoría, la transdiferenciación puede continuar indefinidamente, por lo que la medusa es biológicamente inmortal... y físicamente blandita.
Theoretically, transdifferentiation can.IT: In teoria, la transdifferenziazione può andare avanti all'infinito, rendendo le meduse biologicamente immortali... e mollicce.

When I'm sacrificed, if I'm not <FLEETIN.EN: When I'm sacrificed, if I'm not <FLEETING> — Put me in Reserve.  #When I'm sacrificed, if I'm <FLEETING> — Draw a card.#
When I'm sacrificed, if I'm not <FLEETIN.FR: Lorsque je suis sacrifiée, si je ne suis pas <FLEETING> — Mettez-moi en Réserve.  #Lorsque je suis sacrifiée, si je suis <FLEETING> — Piochez une carte.#
When I'm sacrificed, if I'm not <FLEETIN.DE: Wenn ich geopfert werde und falls ich dabei nicht <FLEETING> bin — Lege mich in die Reserve.  #Wenn ich geopfert werde und falls ich dabei <FLEETING> bin — Ziehe eine Karte.#
When I'm sacrificed, if I'm not <FLEETIN.ES: Cuando me sacrifiques, si no tengo <FLEETING> — Colócame en la reserva.  #Cuando me sacrifiques, si tengo <FLEETING> — Roba una carta.#
When I'm sacrificed, if I'm not <FLEETIN.IT: Quando mi sacrifichi, se non ho <FLEETING> — Mettimi nella Riserva.  #Quando mi sacrifichi, se ho <FLEETING> — Pesca una carta.#

#When a Robot joins your Expeditions — Y.FR: #Lorsqu'un Robot rejoint vos Expéditions — Vous pouvez me sacrifier pour lui donner 2 boosts.#  Lorsque je suis sacrifiée, si je ne suis pas <FLEETING> — Mettez-moi en Réserve.
#When a Robot joins your Expeditions — Y.DE: #Wenn ein Roboter sich einer deiner Expeditionen anschließt — Du darfst mich opfern, um ihm 2 Verstärkungen zu geben.#  Wenn ich geopfert werde und dabei nicht <FLEETING> bin — Lege mich in die Reserve.
#When a Robot joins your Expeditions — Y.ES: #Cuando un robot se incorpore a una de tus expediciones — Puedes sacrificarme para darle 2 potenciadores.#  Cuando me sacrifiques, si no tengo <FLEETING> — Colócame en la reserva.

When you play a Spell — I gain 1 boost$<.EN: When you play a Spell — I gain 1 boost$<BB>.
When you play a Spell — I gain 1 boost$<.FR: Lorsque vous jouez un Sort — Je gagne 1 boost$<BB>.
When you play a Spell — I gain 1 boost$<.DE: Wenn du einen Zauber spielst — Ich erhalte 1 Verstärkung$<BB>.
When you play a Spell — I gain 1 boost$<.ES: Cuando juegues un hechizo — Gano 1 potenciador.
When you play a Spell — I gain 1 boost$<.IT: Quando giochi una magia — Ottengo 1 rinforzo$<BB>.

\"Don't just wait for magic to happen. G.EN: "Don't just wait for magic to happen. Go out and make your own!"
\"Don't just wait for magic to happen. G.FR: "N'attendez pas que la magie vienne à vous, créez la vôtre !"
\"Don't just wait for magic to happen. G.DE: "Warte nicht einfach darauf, dass etwas Magisches passiert. Erschaffe deinen eigenen Zauber!"
\"Don't just wait for magic to happen. G.ES: «No esperes a que la magia se aparezca en tu vida. ¡Hazla tú!».
\"Don't just wait for magic to happen. G.IT: "Non stare ad aspettare che la magia accada. Vai là fuori e creala!"

When you play a Spell — I gain 1 boost..EN: When you play a Spell — I gain 1 boost.  #At Dusk, if I have 3 or more boosts — Draw a card.#
When you play a Spell — I gain 1 boost..FR: Lorsque vous jouez un Sort — Je gagne 1 boost.  #Au Crépuscule, si j'ai au moins 3 boosts — Piochez une carte.#
When you play a Spell — I gain 1 boost..DE: Wenn du einen Zauber spielst — Ich erhalte 1 Verstärkung.  #Falls ich zum Abend mindestens 3 Verstärkungen habe — Ziehe eine Karte.#
When you play a Spell — I gain 1 boost..ES: Cuando juegues un hechizo — Gano 1 potenciador.  #Al anochecer, si tengo 3 potenciadores o más — Roba una carta.#

When you #roll one or more dice# — I gai.FR: Lorsque vous #lancez au moins un dé# — Je gagne 1 boost$<BB>.

She won't read the future in the stars,.EN: She won't read the future in the stars, she'll change it herself.
She won't read the future in the stars,.FR: Elle ne lira pas l'avenir dans les étoiles, elle changera elle-même sa destinée.
She won't read the future in the stars,.DE: Sie wird die Zukunft nicht in den Sternen lesen – sie wird sie persönlich verändern.
She won't read the future in the stars,.ES: No lee el futuro en las estrellas: elige cuál será.
She won't read the future in the stars,.IT: Non leggerà il futuro nelle stelle; lo cambierà lei stessa.

\"One day, I will show you the wonders o.EN: "One day, I will show you the wonders of Avalon and the true might of the Fae realms."
\"One day, I will show you the wonders o.FR: "Un jour, je te montrerai les merveilles d'Avalon, la véritable majesté des royaumes Fae."
\"One day, I will show you the wonders o.DE: "Eines Tages werde ich dir die Wunder von Avalon und die wahre Macht der Fae-Reiche zeigen."
\"One day, I will show you the wonders o.ES: «Un día te mostraré las maravillas de Avalon y el verdadero poder de los reinos feéricos».
\"One day, I will show you the wonders o.IT: "Un giorno ti mostrerò le meraviglie di Avalon e il vero potere dei reami delle fate."

\"I’ve seen it myself! ‘Baku! Baku!’, it.EN: "I’ve seen it myself! ‘Baku! Baku!’, it says, eating up ghosts as though they were candies."
\"I’ve seen it myself! ‘Baku! Baku!’, it.FR: Les Bakus gobent les rêves comme d'autres gobent les fantômes.
\"I’ve seen it myself! ‘Baku! Baku!’, it.DE: "Ich habe es mit eigenen Augen gesehen! ‘Baku! Baku!’, ruft es und verspeist Geister, als wären es Bonbons."
\"I’ve seen it myself! ‘Baku! Baku!’, it.ES: «¡En serio! Dice "Baku, baku" y se traga los fantasmas como si fueran caramelos».
\"I’ve seen it myself! ‘Baku! Baku!’, it.IT: "L'ho visto con i miei occhi! "Baku! Baku!", dice, divorando i fantasmi come fossero caramelle."

Help or harm? Only the card will tell..EN: Help or harm? Only the card will tell.
Help or harm? Only the card will tell..FR: Faveur ou infortune ? Seul le tirage le révélera.
Help or harm? Only the card will tell..DE: Schutz oder Schaden? Das kann nur die Karte zeigen.
Help or harm? Only the card will tell..ES: ¿Te ayudará o será tu perdición? Las cartas lo dirán.
Help or harm? Only the card will tell..IT: Aiuto o danno? Solo la carta potrà dirlo.

Alchemy is not just a matter of turning.EN: Alchemy is not just a matter of turning lead to gold. It's about purifying yourself of imperfections to become your true self.
Alchemy is not just a matter of turning.FR: L'alchimie n'est pas que la transformation du plomb en or. C'est la purification de nos imperfections en vue de révéler notre vraie nature.
Alchemy is not just a matter of turning.DE: In der Alchemie geht es nicht nur darum, Blei in Gold zu verwandeln. Alchemisten wollen sich von Unvollkommenheiten befreien und so ihr wahres Selbst finden.
Alchemy is not just a matter of turning.ES: El objetivo de la alquimia no es solo convertir el plomo en oro, es purificarse de imperfecciones para alcanzar todo el potencial.
Alchemy is not just a matter of turning.IT: L'alchimia non è soltanto trasformare il piombo in oro. È purificarsi dalle imperfezioni per trovare il tuo vero io.

\"One good turn deserves another.\".FR:
"Je parie que vous n’avez jamais parlé au Temps."
"Cela se peut bien, répliqua prudemment Alice, mais je l’ai souvent mal employé."
\"One good turn deserves another.\".IT: "Se tu conoscessi il tempo come lo conosco io, non diresti che lo perdiamo."

Rubedo is the final stage of alchemy, wh.EN: Rubedo is the final stage of alchemy, where one's substance is reborn like a phoenix before returning to the world.
Rubedo is the final stage of alchemy, wh.FR: Le Rubedo est l'étape finale de l'alchimie, où la substance d'un individu renaît tel un phénix avant de retourner au monde.
Rubedo is the final stage of alchemy, wh.DE: Rubedo ist die letzte Stufe der Alchemie, in der die eigene Substanz wie ein Phönix wiedergeboren wird, bevor sie in die Welt zurückkehrt.
Rubedo is the final stage of alchemy, wh.ES: El Rubedo es la última fase de la alquimia, el momento en que una sustancia renace como el fénix antes de regresar al mundo.
Rubedo is the final stage of alchemy, wh.IT: La Rubedo è la fase finale dell'alchimia, dove la sostanza rinasce come una fenice prima di fare ritorno nel mondo.

\"There are gates one should not open, t.EN: "There are gates one should not open, there are seals one should not breach. And yet I will."
\"There are gates one should not open, t.FR: "Il y a des portes que l'on ne doit pas ouvrir, des sceaux que l'on ne doit pas briser. Et pourtant, je le ferai."
\"There are gates one should not open, t.DE: "Es gibt Tore, die man nicht öffnen, und Siegel, die man nicht brechen sollte. Und dennoch werde ich beides tun."
\"There are gates one should not open, t.ES: «Hay puertas que no se deben abrir, sellos que no se deben romper. Y sin embargo, yo lo haré».
\"There are gates one should not open, t.IT: "Ci sono portali che non dovrebbero essere aperti e sigilli che non dovrebbero essere infranti. Eppure lo farò."

The Kraken tears open the surface, sendi.EN: The Kraken tears open the surface, sending plumes of water crashing down on the troops in an apocalyptic deluge.
The Kraken tears open the surface, sendi.FR: Le Kraken éventre la surface, projetant aux alentours des panaches d’eau qui retombent sur les troupes en un déluge de fin du monde.

The Kraken tears open the surface, sendi.IT: Il Kraken lacera la superficie, lanciando getti d'acqua che si infrangono sulle truppe in un diluvio apocalittico.

When such a terrifying being appears in.EN: When such a terrifying being appears in your path, taking a step back is only natural.
When such a terrifying being appears in.FR: Face à une entité aussi imposante, il est naturel de prendre un peu de recul sur la situation.

When such a terrifying being appears in.IT: Quando un essere tanto terrificante appare sul tuo cammino, fare un passo indietro è più che naturale.

Her being begins to disintegrate as she.EN: Her being begins to disintegrate as she breaks all the Mana bridges linking the idea of who she is to physical matter.
Her being begins to disintegrate as she.FR: Son corps se met à se désagréger alors qu’elle rompt tous les ponts de Mana qui lient son essence à la matière.
Her being begins to disintegrate as she.DE: Ihr Wesen beginnt sich aufzulösen, während sie alle Mana-Brücken hinter sich abbricht, die das Konzept des eigenen Selbst mit der physischen Materie verbinden.
Her being begins to disintegrate as she.ES: Su cuerpo empieza a desintegrarse mientras rompe todos los puentes de maná que vinculan la idea de su ser a su forma física.
Her being begins to disintegrate as she.IT: Il suo essere inizia a disintegrarsi non appena rompe tutti i ponti di mana che collegano l'idea che ha di sé con la materia fisica.

The Imagination shapes our reality just.EN: The Imagination shapes our reality just as our beliefs shaped the Æther.

The journey of a thousand miles begins w.IT: Il viaggio di centinaia di chilometri inizia con un passo.

Target Expedition moves forward one regi.EN: Target Expedition moves forward one region.
Target Expedition moves forward one regi.DE: Eine Expedition deiner Wahl bewegt sich eine Region vorwärts.
Target Expedition moves forward one regi.ES: Una expedición objetivo avanza una región.
Target Expedition moves forward one regi.IT: Una spedizione bersaglio avanza di una regione.

$<FLEETING>. Send to Reserve up to thre.EN: $<FLEETING>.  Send to Reserve up to three target Characters with a total Hand Cost {5} or less.
$<FLEETING>. Send to Reserve up to thre.FR: $<FLEETING>.  Envoyez en Réserve jusqu'à trois Personnages ciblés avec un Coût de Main total de {5} ou moins.
$<FLEETING>. Send to Reserve up to thre.DE: $<FLEETING>.  Schicke bis zu drei Charaktere deiner Wahl mit Gesamt-Handkosten von {5} oder weniger in die Reserve.
$<FLEETING>. Send to Reserve up to thre.ES: $<FLEETING>.  Envía a la reserva hasta tres personajes objetivo con coste desde la mano total de {5} o menos.
$<FLEETING>. Send to Reserve up to thre.IT: $<FLEETING>.  Manda nella Riserva fino a tre personaggi bersaglio con un costo dalla mano totale pari o inferiore a {5}.

The roaring waves crashed down over the.EN: The roaring waves crashed down over the charging armies, and countless soldiers vanished beneath the raging waters.
The roaring waves crashed down over the.FR: Les vagues rugissantes se brisèrent sur les armées qui chargeaient, et d'innombrables soldats disparurent sous les eaux en furie.
The roaring waves crashed down over the.DE: Die tosenden Wellen brachen über die angreifenden Armeen herein, und unzählige Soldaten verschwanden in den brausenden Fluten.
The roaring waves crashed down over the.ES: Las olas aplastaron con fuerza al ejército en mitad de su carga, y un sinnúmero de soldados se perdieron en las profundidades del mar embravecido.
The roaring waves crashed down over the.IT: Le onde ruggenti si infransero sugli eserciti alla carica e innumerevoli soldati svanirono sotto le acque impetuose.

$<FLEETING>. Send to Reserve up to #fou.EN: $<FLEETING>.  Send to Reserve up to #four# target Characters with a total Hand Cost #{6} or less#.
$<FLEETING>. Send to Reserve up to #fou.FR: $<FLEETING>.  Envoyez en Réserve jusqu'à #quatre# Personnages ciblés avec un Coût de Main total de #{6} ou moins#.
$<FLEETING>. Send to Reserve up to #fou.DE: $<FLEETING>.  Schicke bis zu #vier# Charaktere deiner Wahl mit Gesamt-Handkosten von #{6} oder weniger# in die Reserve.
$<FLEETING>. Send to Reserve up to #fou.ES: $<FLEETING>.  Envía a la reserva hasta #cuatro# personajes objetivo con coste desde la mano total de #{6} o menos#.
$<FLEETING>. Send to Reserve up to #fou.IT: $<FLEETING>.  Manda nella Riserva fino a #quattro# personaggi bersaglio con un costo dalla mano totale #pari o inferiore a {6}#.

$<FLEETING>. Discard up to two targets,.EN: $<FLEETING>.  Discard up to two targets, Characters or Permanents.
$<FLEETING>. Discard up to two targets,.FR: $<FLEETING>.  Défaussez jusqu'à deux cibles, Personnages ou Permanents.
$<FLEETING>. Discard up to two targets,.DE: $<FLEETING>.  Lege bis zu zwei Karten deiner Wahl ab – Charaktere oder bleibende Karten.
$<FLEETING>. Discard up to two targets,.ES: $<FLEETING>.  Descarta hasta dos objetivos, personajes o permanentes.
$<FLEETING>. Discard up to two targets,.IT: $<FLEETING>.  Scarta fino a due bersagli, che siano personaggi o permanenti.

The sky cracked open in a thunderous wav.EN: The sky cracked open in a thunderous wave as the dream was unleashed upon the world.
The sky cracked open in a thunderous wav.FR: Le ciel se fendit en ondes tempétueuses alors que le rêve s'épanchait sur le monde.
The sky cracked open in a thunderous wav.DE: Der Himmel öffnete sich in einer donnernden Welle, als der Traum auf die Welt losgelassen wurde.
The sky cracked open in a thunderous wav.ES: El cielo se abrió con un estruendo cuando el sueño se liberó sobre el mundo.
The sky cracked open in a thunderous wav.IT: Il cielo si spalancò in un'onda tonante quando il sogno venne liberato sul mondo.

Boney Legs, she's called, and her hut is.EN: Boney Legs, she's called, and her hut is one reason why.
Boney Legs, she's called, and her hut is.FR: Vous préférez les ailes ou la cuisse ?
Boney Legs, she's called, and her hut is.DE: Knochenbein wird sie genannt, und ihre Hütte ist einer der Gründe dafür.
Boney Legs, she's called, and her hut is.ES: Hay quienes la llaman «patapollo», en parte por su choza.
Boney Legs, she's called, and her hut is.IT: La chiamano Gamba d'osso e il suo rifugio è una delle ragioni.

No mere trinket, but a fragment of pures.EN: No mere trinket, but a fragment of purest dream.
No mere trinket, but a fragment of pures.FR: Ce n'est pas un simple colifichet, mais un fragment même du rêve.
No mere trinket, but a fragment of pures.DE: Kein bloßes Schmuckstück, sondern ein Fragment aus reinstem Traum.
No mere trinket, but a fragment of pures.ES: No es una simple fruslería, es un fragmento de sueño puro.
No mere trinket, but a fragment of pures.IT: Non è un semplice gingillo, ma un frammento di puro sogno.

{T} : The next Spell you play this turn.EN: {T} : The next Spell you play this turn is free.
{T} : The next Spell you play this turn.FR: {T} : Le prochain Sort que vous jouez ce tour est gratuit.

What dark, phantasmagorical secrets hide.EN: What dark, phantasmagorical secrets hide within Asgartha's College of Magic? Only madmen and the Yzmirs know for sure...
What dark, phantasmagorical secrets hide.FR: Seuls les Yzmir et les fous savent quels fantasmagoriques et sombres secrets cache le Collège de Magie d'Asgartha.
What dark, phantasmagorical secrets hide.DE: Welche dunklen, phantasmagorischen Geheimnisse verbergen sich in Asgarthas Akademie der Magie? Nur Verrückte und die Yzmir wissen das mit Sicherheit …
What dark, phantasmagorical secrets hide.ES: ¿Qué secretos siniestros se esconden en el Colegio de magia de Asgartha? Tan solo los dementes y los de Yzmir lo saben con seguridad...
What dark, phantasmagorical secrets hide.IT: Quali oscuri segreti fantasmagorici si celano nella Scuola di magia di Asgartha? Solo i folli e gli Yzmir lo sanno per certo...

When you sacrifice a Character — I gain.EN: When you sacrifice a Character — I gain 2 boosts.
When you sacrifice a Character — I gain.FR: Lorsque vous sacrifiez un Personnage — Je gagne 2 boosts.

When you sacrifice a Character — I gain.IT: Quando sacrifichi un personaggio — Ottengo 2 rinforzi.

Always hungry for new ideas....ES: Siempre con hambre de nuevas ideas...

End your turn as if you had played a car.EN: End your turn as if you had played a card. You may still play cards later this Day.
End your turn as if you had played a car.FR: Terminez votre tour comme si vous aviez joué une carte. Vous pouvez encore jouer des cartes plus tard ce Jour.
End your turn as if you had played a car.DE: Beende deine Runde, als ob du eine Karte gespielt hättest. Du darfst auch später an diesem Tag noch eine Karte spielen.
End your turn as if you had played a car.ES: Termina tu turno como si hubieras jugado una carta. A lo largo del día actual, puedes jugar más cartas.
End your turn as if you had played a car.IT: Termina il tuo turno come se avessi giocato una carta. Puoi comunque giocare carte più avanti in questa giornata.

During Rest, I don't go to Reserve and I.EN: During Rest, I don't go to Reserve and I lose Anchored.
During Rest, I don't go to Reserve and I.FR: Au Repos, je ne vais pas en Réserve et je perds Ancré.
During Rest, I don't go to Reserve and I.DE: Während der Ruhepause gehe ich nicht in die Reserve und verliere Verankert.

During Rest, I don't go to Reserve and I.IT: Durante il riposo, non vado nella Riserva e perdo Ancorato.

During Dusk, ignore my statistics. Durin.EN: During Dusk, ignore my statistics. During Rest, I don't go to Reserve and I lose Asleep.
During Dusk, ignore my statistics. Durin.FR: Au Crépuscule, ignorez mes statistiques. Au Repos, je ne vais pas en Réserve et je perds Endormi.
During Dusk, ignore my statistics. Durin.DE: Am Abend ignoriere meine Statistiken. Während der Ruhepause gehe ich nicht in die Reserve und verliere Schlafend.
During Dusk, ignore my statistics. Durin.ES: Durante el anochecer, ignora mis estadísticas. Durante el descanso, no voy a la reserva y pierdo sueño.
During Dusk, ignore my statistics. Durin.IT: Durante il crepuscolo, ignora le mie statistiche. Durante il riposo, non vado nella Riserva e perdo Dormiente.

A boost is a +1/+1/+1 counter. Remove it.EN: A boost is a +1/+1/+1 counter. Remove it when it leaves the Expedition zone.
A boost is a +1/+1/+1 counter. Remove it.FR: Un boost est un compteur +1/+1/+1. Retirez-le lorsqu'il quitte la zone d'Expédition.
A boost is a +1/+1/+1 counter. Remove it.DE: Eine Verstärkung ist ein +1/+1/+1-Zähler. Entferne sie, wenn sie die Expeditionszone verlässt.
A boost is a +1/+1/+1 counter. Remove it.ES: Un potenciador es un contador +1/+1/+1. Retíralo cuando abandone la zona de expedición.
A boost is a +1/+1/+1 counter. Remove it.IT: Un rinforzo è un segnalino +1/+1/+1. Rimuovilo quando lascia l'area delle spedizioni.

Send me to Discard instead of Reserve af.IT: Mandami negli Scarti invece che nella Riserva dopo che il mio effetto si risolve.

If I would be sent to Reserve, discard m.ES: Si fuese a ir a la reserva, en vez de eso, descártame.
If I would be sent to Reserve, discard m.IT: Se sto per finire nella Riserva, scartami invece.

I am considered present in each of your.EN: I am considered present in each of your Expeditions.
